1. Home
  2. Archives

数分例题

First Post:
2026-03-10

Last Update:
2026-03-16

不定积分

一

题目：

  1. ∫sec⁡3x dx\displaystyle \int \sec^3 x \, dx∫sec3xdx
  2. ∫x2+a2 dx(a>0)\displaystyle \int \sqrt{x^2 + a^2} \, dx \quad (a > 0)∫x2+a2​dx(a>0)
  3. ∫x2−a2 dx(a>0)\displaystyle \int \sqrt{x^2 - a^2} \, dx \quad (a > 0)∫x2−a2​dx(a>0)

解

(1) ∫sec⁡3x dx\int \sec^3 x \, dx∫sec3xdx

∫sec⁡3x dx=∫sec⁡x⋅sec⁡2x dx\int \sec^3 x \, dx = \int \sec x \cdot \sec^2 x \, dx ∫sec3xdx=∫secx⋅sec2xdx

令u=sec⁡x，dv=sec⁡2x dxu = \sec x，dv = \sec^2 x \, dxu=secx，dv=sec2xdx，则

du=sec⁡xtan⁡x dx，v=tan⁡x。du = \sec x \tan x \, dx，v = \tan x。 du=secxtanxdx，v=tanx。

∫sec⁡3x dx=sec⁡xtan⁡x−∫sec⁡xtan⁡2x dx\int \sec^3 x \, dx = \sec x \tan x - \int \sec x \tan^2 x \, dx ∫sec3xdx=secxtanx−∫secxtan2xdx

tan⁡2x=sec⁡2x−1\tan^2 x = \sec^2 x - 1 tan2x=sec2x−1

∫sec⁡3x dx=sec⁡xtan⁡x−∫sec⁡x(sec⁡2x−1) dx\int \sec^3 x \, dx = \sec x \tan x - \int \sec x (\sec^2 x - 1) \, dx ∫sec3xdx=secxtanx−∫secx(sec2x−1)dx

=sec⁡xtan⁡x−∫sec⁡3x dx+∫sec⁡x dx= \sec x \tan x - \int \sec^3 x \, dx + \int \sec x \, dx =secxtanx−∫sec3xdx+∫secxdx

移项：

2∫sec⁡3x dx=sec⁡xtan⁡x+ln⁡∣sec⁡x+tan⁡x∣+C2 \int \sec^3 x \, dx = \sec x \tan x + \ln|\sec x + \tan x| + C 2∫sec3xdx=secxtanx+ln∣secx+tanx∣+C

∫sec⁡3x dx=12sec⁡xtan⁡x+12ln⁡∣sec⁡x+tan⁡x∣+C\int \sec^3 x \, dx = \frac12 \sec x \tan x + \frac12 \ln|\sec x + \tan x| + C ∫sec3xdx=21​secxtanx+21​ln∣secx+tanx∣+C

(2) ∫x2+a2 dx\int \sqrt{x^2 + a^2} \, dx∫x2+a2​dx

令 x=atan⁡tx = a \tan tx=atant，则 dx=asec⁡2t dt，x2+a2=asec⁡tdx = a \sec^2 t \, dt，\sqrt{x^2 + a^2} = a \sec tdx=asec2tdt，x2+a2​=asect。

∫x2+a2 dx=∫asec⁡t⋅asec⁡2t dt=a2∫sec⁡3t dt\int \sqrt{x^2 + a^2} \, dx = \int a \sec t \cdot a \sec^2 t \, dt = a^2 \int \sec^3 t \, dt ∫x2+a2​dx=∫asect⋅asec2tdt=a2∫sec3tdt

由 (1) 的结果：

∫sec⁡3t dt=12sec⁡ttan⁡t+12ln⁡∣sec⁡t+tan⁡t∣+C\int \sec^3 t \, dt = \frac12 \sec t \tan t + \frac12 \ln|\sec t + \tan t| + C ∫sec3tdt=21​secttant+21​ln∣sect+tant∣+C

代回：

∫x2+a2 dx=a2(12sec⁡ttan⁡t+12ln⁡∣sec⁡t+tan⁡t∣)+C\int \sqrt{x^2 + a^2} \, dx = a^2 \left( \frac12 \sec t \tan t + \frac12 \ln|\sec t + \tan t| \right) + C ∫x2+a2​dx=a2(21​secttant+21​ln∣sect+tant∣)+C

sec⁡t=x2+a2a,tan⁡t=xa\sec t = \frac{\sqrt{x^2 + a^2}}{a}, \quad \tan t = \frac{x}{a} sect=ax2+a2​​,tant=ax​

∫x2+a2 dx=12xx2+a2+a22ln⁡∣x+x2+a2a∣+C\int \sqrt{x^2 + a^2} \, dx = \frac12 x \sqrt{x^2 + a^2} + \frac{a^2}{2} \ln\left| \frac{x + \sqrt{x^2 + a^2}}{a} \right| + C ∫x2+a2​dx=21​xx2+a2​+2a2​ln∣∣∣∣∣∣​ax+x2+a2​​∣∣∣∣∣∣​+C

常数 a22ln⁡a可并入C，得：\frac{a^2}{2} \ln a 可并入 C，得：2a2​lna可并入C，得：

∫x2+a2 dx=12xx2+a2+a22ln⁡∣x+x2+a2∣+C\boxed{\int \sqrt{x^2 + a^2} \, dx = \frac12 x \sqrt{x^2 + a^2} + \frac{a^2}{2} \ln\left| x + \sqrt{x^2 + a^2} \right| + C} ∫x2+a2​dx=21​xx2+a2​+2a2​ln∣∣∣∣​x+x2+a2​∣∣∣∣​+C​

(3) ∫x2−a2 dx\int \sqrt{x^2 - a^2} \, dx∫x2−a2​dx

令 x=asec⁡t，则dx=asec⁡ttan⁡t dt，x2−a2=atan⁡t。x = a \sec t，则 dx = a \sec t \tan t \, dt，\sqrt{x^2 - a^2} = a \tan t。x=asect，则dx=asecttantdt，x2−a2​=atant。

∫x2−a2 dx=∫atan⁡t⋅asec⁡ttan⁡t dt=a2∫sec⁡ttan⁡2t dt\int \sqrt{x^2 - a^2} \, dx = \int a \tan t \cdot a \sec t \tan t \, dt = a^2 \int \sec t \tan^2 t \, dt ∫x2−a2​dx=∫atant⋅asecttantdt=a2∫secttan2tdt

tan⁡2t=sec⁡2t−1\tan^2 t = \sec^2 t - 1 tan2t=sec2t−1

∫x2−a2 dx=a2(∫sec⁡3t dt−∫sec⁡t dt)\int \sqrt{x^2 - a^2} \, dx = a^2 \left( \int \sec^3 t \, dt - \int \sec t \, dt \right) ∫x2−a2​dx=a2(∫sec3tdt−∫sectdt)

由 (1) 和 ∫sec⁡t dt=ln⁡∣sec⁡t+tan⁡t∣：\int \sec t \, dt = \ln|\sec t + \tan t|：∫sectdt=ln∣sect+tant∣：

∫sec⁡3t dt−∫sec⁡t dt=12sec⁡ttan⁡t−12ln⁡∣sec⁡t+tan⁡t∣\int \sec^3 t \, dt - \int \sec t \, dt = \frac12 \sec t \tan t - \frac12 \ln|\sec t + \tan t| ∫sec3tdt−∫sectdt=21​secttant−21​ln∣sect+tant∣

代回：

∫x2−a2 dx=a2(12sec⁡ttan⁡t−12ln⁡∣sec⁡t+tan⁡t∣)+C\int \sqrt{x^2 - a^2} \, dx = a^2 \left( \frac12 \sec t \tan t - \frac12 \ln|\sec t + \tan t| \right) + C ∫x2−a2​dx=a2(21​secttant−21​ln∣sect+tant∣)+C

sec⁡t=xa,tan⁡t=x2−a2a\sec t = \frac{x}{a}, \quad \tan t = \frac{\sqrt{x^2 - a^2}}{a} sect=ax​,tant=ax2−a2​​

∫x2−a2 dx=12xx2−a2−a22ln⁡∣x+x2−a2∣+C\int \sqrt{x^2 - a^2} \, dx = \frac12 x \sqrt{x^2 - a^2} - \frac{a^2}{2} \ln\left| x + \sqrt{x^2 - a^2} \right| + C ∫x2−a2​dx=21​xx2−a2​−2a2​ln∣∣∣∣​x+x2−a2​∣∣∣∣​+C

（注意 ln⁡∣a∣\ln|a|ln∣a∣ 已并入 C）

∫x2−a2 dx=12xx2−a2−a22ln⁡∣x+x2−a2∣+C\boxed{\int \sqrt{x^2 - a^2} \, dx = \frac12 x \sqrt{x^2 - a^2} - \frac{a^2}{2} \ln\left| x + \sqrt{x^2 - a^2} \right| + C} ∫x2−a2​dx=21​xx2−a2​−2a2​ln∣∣∣∣​x+x2−a2​∣∣∣∣​+C​

二

第一部分：证明递推公式

已知：

I(m,n)=∫cos⁡mxsin⁡nx dx,m+n≠0I(m, n) = \int \cos^m x \sin^n x \, dx, \quad m+n \neq 0 I(m,n)=∫cosmxsinnxdx,m+n=0

要证：

I(m,n)=cos⁡m−1xsin⁡n+1xm+n+m−1m+nI(m−2,n)I(m, n) = \frac{\cos^{m-1} x \sin^{n+1} x}{m+n} + \frac{m-1}{m+n} I(m-2, n) I(m,n)=m+ncosm−1xsinn+1x​+m+nm−1​I(m−2,n)

和

I(m,n)=−cos⁡m+1xsin⁡n−1xm+n+n−1m+nI(m,n−2)I(m, n) = -\frac{\cos^{m+1} x \sin^{n-1} x}{m+n} + \frac{n-1}{m+n} I(m, n-2) I(m,n)=−m+ncosm+1xsinn−1x​+m+nn−1​I(m,n−2)

证明第一个公式

设 f(x)=cos⁡m−1xsin⁡n+1x，求导：f(x) = \cos^{m-1} x \sin^{n+1} x，求导：f(x)=cosm−1xsinn+1x，求导：

f′(x)=(m−1)cos⁡m−2x(−sin⁡x)sin⁡n+1x+cos⁡m−1x(n+1)sin⁡nxcos⁡xf'(x) = (m-1)\cos^{m-2} x (-\sin x) \sin^{n+1} x + \cos^{m-1} x (n+1) \sin^{n} x \cos x f′(x)=(m−1)cosm−2x(−sinx)sinn+1x+cosm−1x(n+1)sinnxcosx

=−(m−1)cos⁡m−2xsin⁡n+2x+(n+1)cos⁡mxsin⁡nx= -(m-1)\cos^{m-2} x \sin^{n+2} x + (n+1)\cos^{m} x \sin^{n} x =−(m−1)cosm−2xsinn+2x+(n+1)cosmxsinnx

两边积分：

cos⁡m−1xsin⁡n+1x=−(m−1)∫cos⁡m−2xsin⁡n+2x dx+(n+1)I(m,n)\cos^{m-1} x \sin^{n+1} x = -(m-1) \int \cos^{m-2} x \sin^{n+2} x \, dx + (n+1) I(m, n) cosm−1xsinn+1x=−(m−1)∫cosm−2xsinn+2xdx+(n+1)I(m,n)

记 J=∫cos⁡m−2xsin⁡n+2x dx。J = \int \cos^{m-2} x \sin^{n+2} x \, dx。J=∫cosm−2xsinn+2xdx。
用 sin⁡n+2x=sin⁡nx(1−cos⁡2x)：\sin^{n+2} x = \sin^{n} x (1 - \cos^2 x)：sinn+2x=sinnx(1−cos2x)：

J=∫cos⁡m−2xsin⁡nx dx−∫cos⁡mxsin⁡nx dxJ = \int \cos^{m-2} x \sin^{n} x \, dx - \int \cos^{m} x \sin^{n} x \, dx J=∫cosm−2xsinnxdx−∫cosmxsinnxdx

J=I(m−2,n)−I(m,n)J = I(m-2, n) - I(m, n) J=I(m−2,n)−I(m,n)

代入：

cos⁡m−1xsin⁡n+1x=−(m−1)[I(m−2,n)−I(m,n)]+(n+1)I(m,n)\cos^{m-1} x \sin^{n+1} x = -(m-1)[I(m-2, n) - I(m, n)] + (n+1) I(m, n) cosm−1xsinn+1x=−(m−1)[I(m−2,n)−I(m,n)]+(n+1)I(m,n)

=−(m−1)I(m−2,n)+(m−1)I(m,n)+(n+1)I(m,n)= -(m-1) I(m-2, n) + (m-1) I(m, n) + (n+1) I(m, n) =−(m−1)I(m−2,n)+(m−1)I(m,n)+(n+1)I(m,n)

=−(m−1)I(m−2,n)+(m+n)I(m,n)= -(m-1) I(m-2, n) + (m+n) I(m, n) =−(m−1)I(m−2,n)+(m+n)I(m,n)

所以：

(m+n)I(m,n)=cos⁡m−1xsin⁡n+1x+(m−1)I(m−2,n)(m+n) I(m, n) = \cos^{m-1} x \sin^{n+1} x + (m-1) I(m-2, n) (m+n)I(m,n)=cosm−1xsinn+1x+(m−1)I(m−2,n)

I(m,n)=cos⁡m−1xsin⁡n+1xm+n+m−1m+nI(m−2,n)\boxed{I(m, n) = \frac{\cos^{m-1} x \sin^{n+1} x}{m+n} + \frac{m-1}{m+n} I(m-2, n)} I(m,n)=m+ncosm−1xsinn+1x​+m+nm−1​I(m−2,n)​

证明第二个公式

设 g(x)=cos⁡m+1xsin⁡n−1x,g(x) = \cos^{m+1} x \sin^{n-1} x,g(x)=cosm+1xsinn−1x,求导：

g′(x)=(m+1)cos⁡mx(−sin⁡x)sin⁡n−1x+cos⁡m+1x(n−1)sin⁡n−2xcos⁡xg'(x) = (m+1)\cos^{m} x (-\sin x) \sin^{n-1} x + \cos^{m+1} x (n-1) \sin^{n-2} x \cos x g′(x)=(m+1)cosmx(−sinx)sinn−1x+cosm+1x(n−1)sinn−2xcosx

=−(m+1)cos⁡mxsin⁡nx+(n−1)cos⁡m+2xsin⁡n−2x= -(m+1)\cos^{m} x \sin^{n} x + (n-1)\cos^{m+2} x \sin^{n-2} x =−(m+1)cosmxsinnx+(n−1)cosm+2xsinn−2x

两边积分：

cos⁡m+1xsin⁡n−1x=−(m+1)I(m,n)+(n−1)∫cos⁡m+2xsin⁡n−2x dx\cos^{m+1} x \sin^{n-1} x = -(m+1) I(m, n) + (n-1) \int \cos^{m+2} x \sin^{n-2} x \, dx cosm+1xsinn−1x=−(m+1)I(m,n)+(n−1)∫cosm+2xsinn−2xdx

记 K=∫cos⁡m+2xsin⁡n−2x dx。K = \int \cos^{m+2} x \sin^{n-2} x \, dx。K=∫cosm+2xsinn−2xdx。
用 cos⁡m+2x=cos⁡mx(1−sin⁡2x)：\cos^{m+2} x = \cos^{m} x (1 - \sin^2 x)：cosm+2x=cosmx(1−sin2x)：

K=∫cos⁡mxsin⁡n−2x dx−∫cos⁡mxsin⁡nx dxK = \int \cos^{m} x \sin^{n-2} x \, dx - \int \cos^{m} x \sin^{n} x \, dx K=∫cosmxsinn−2xdx−∫cosmxsinnxdx

K=I(m,n−2)−I(m,n)K = I(m, n-2) - I(m, n) K=I(m,n−2)−I(m,n)

代入：

cos⁡m+1xsin⁡n−1x=−(m+1)I(m,n)+(n−1)[I(m,n−2)−I(m,n)]\cos^{m+1} x \sin^{n-1} x = -(m+1) I(m, n) + (n-1)[I(m, n-2) - I(m, n)] cosm+1xsinn−1x=−(m+1)I(m,n)+(n−1)[I(m,n−2)−I(m,n)]

=−(m+1)I(m,n)+(n−1)I(m,n−2)−(n−1)I(m,n)= -(m+1) I(m, n) + (n-1) I(m, n-2) - (n-1) I(m, n) =−(m+1)I(m,n)+(n−1)I(m,n−2)−(n−1)I(m,n)

=−(m+n)I(m,n)+(n−1)I(m,n−2)= -(m+n) I(m, n) + (n-1) I(m, n-2) =−(m+n)I(m,n)+(n−1)I(m,n−2)

所以：

(m+n)I(m,n)=−cos⁡m+1xsin⁡n−1x+(n−1)I(m,n−2)(m+n) I(m, n) = -\cos^{m+1} x \sin^{n-1} x + (n-1) I(m, n-2) (m+n)I(m,n)=−cosm+1xsinn−1x+(n−1)I(m,n−2)

I(m,n)=−cos⁡m+1xsin⁡n−1xm+n+n−1m+nI(m,n−2)\boxed{I(m, n) = -\frac{\cos^{m+1} x \sin^{n-1} x}{m+n} + \frac{n-1}{m+n} I(m, n-2)} I(m,n)=−m+ncosm+1xsinn−1x​+m+nn−1​I(m,n−2)​

第二部分：应用

题目：

  1. ∫tan⁡3x dx\displaystyle \int \tan^3 x \, dx∫tan3xdx
  2. ∫tan⁡4x dx\displaystyle \int \tan^4 x \, dx∫tan4xdx
  3. ∫cos⁡2xsin⁡4x dx\displaystyle \int \cos^2 x \sin^4 x \, dx∫cos2xsin4xdx

(1) ∫tan⁡3x dx\int \tan^3 x \, dx∫tan3xdx

tan⁡3x=cos⁡−3xsin⁡3x，此时m=−3,n=3，m+n=0，\tan^3 x = \cos^{-3} x \sin^3 x，此时 m = -3, n = 3，m+n=0，tan3x=cos−3xsin3x，此时m=−3,n=3，m+n=0，递推公式不能用，直接计算：

tan⁡3x=tan⁡x(sec⁡2x−1)=tan⁡xsec⁡2x−tan⁡x\tan^3 x = \tan x (\sec^2 x - 1) = \tan x \sec^2 x - \tan x tan3x=tanx(sec2x−1)=tanxsec2x−tanx

∫tan⁡3x dx=∫tan⁡xsec⁡2x dx−∫tan⁡x dx\int \tan^3 x \, dx = \int \tan x \sec^2 x \, dx - \int \tan x \, dx ∫tan3xdx=∫tanxsec2xdx−∫tanxdx

第一个积分：令 u=tan⁡x，du=sec⁡2xdx，得12tan⁡2x。u = \tan x，du = \sec^2 x dx，得 \frac12 \tan^2 x。u=tanx，du=sec2xdx，得21​tan2x。
第二个积分：∫tan⁡x dx=−ln⁡∣cos⁡x∣。\int \tan x \, dx = -\ln|\cos x|。∫tanxdx=−ln∣cosx∣。

所以：

∫tan⁡3x dx=12tan⁡2x+ln⁡∣cos⁡x∣+C\boxed{\int \tan^3 x \, dx = \frac12 \tan^2 x + \ln|\cos x| + C} ∫tan3xdx=21​tan2x+ln∣cosx∣+C​

(2) ∫tan⁡4x dx\int \tan^4 x \, dx∫tan4xdx

同理，m=−4,n=4，m+n=0m=-4, n=4，m+n=0m=−4,n=4，m+n=0，直接计算：

tan⁡4x=sec⁡2xtan⁡2x−tan⁡2x\tan^4 x = \sec^2 x \tan^2 x - \tan^2 x tan4x=sec2xtan2x−tan2x

∫tan⁡4x dx=∫sec⁡2xtan⁡2x dx−∫tan⁡2x dx\int \tan^4 x \, dx = \int \sec^2 x \tan^2 x \, dx - \int \tan^2 x \, dx ∫tan4xdx=∫sec2xtan2xdx−∫tan2xdx

第一个积分：令u=tan⁡x，得13tan⁡3x。令 u = \tan x，得 \frac13 \tan^3 x。令u=tanx，得31​tan3x。
第二个积分：∫tan⁡2x dx=tan⁡x−x。\int \tan^2 x \, dx = \tan x - x。∫tan2xdx=tanx−x。

所以：

∫tan⁡4x dx=13tan⁡3x−tan⁡x+x+C\boxed{\int \tan^4 x \, dx = \frac13 \tan^3 x - \tan x + x + C} ∫tan4xdx=31​tan3x−tanx+x+C​

(3) ∫cos⁡2xsin⁡4x dx\int \cos^2 x \sin^4 x \, dx∫cos2xsin4xdx

此时 m=2,n=4，m+n=6≠0m=2, n=4，m+n=6\neq 0m=2,n=4，m+n=6=0，用第一个递推公式：

I(2,4)=cos⁡1xsin⁡5x6+16I(0,4)I(2,4) = \frac{\cos^{1} x \sin^{5} x}{6} + \frac{1}{6} I(0,4) I(2,4)=6cos1xsin5x​+61​I(0,4)

I(0,4)=∫sin⁡4x dxI(0,4) = \int \sin^4 x \, dx I(0,4)=∫sin4xdx

计算 I(0,4)：

sin⁡4x=(1−cos⁡2x2)2=14(1−2cos⁡2x+cos⁡22x)\sin^4 x = \left( \frac{1-\cos 2x}{2} \right)^2 = \frac14 (1 - 2\cos 2x + \cos^2 2x) sin4x=(21−cos2x​)2=41​(1−2cos2x+cos22x)

cos⁡22x=1+cos⁡4x2\cos^2 2x = \frac{1+\cos 4x}{2} cos22x=21+cos4x​

sin⁡4x=14−12cos⁡2x+18+18cos⁡4x=38−12cos⁡2x+18cos⁡4x\sin^4 x = \frac14 - \frac12 \cos 2x + \frac18 + \frac18 \cos 4x = \frac38 - \frac12 \cos 2x + \frac18 \cos 4x sin4x=41​−21​cos2x+81​+81​cos4x=83​−21​cos2x+81​cos4x

∫sin⁡4x dx=38x−14sin⁡2x+132sin⁡4x+C\int \sin^4 x \, dx = \frac38 x - \frac14 \sin 2x + \frac{1}{32} \sin 4x + C ∫sin4xdx=83​x−41​sin2x+321​sin4x+C

代回：

I(2,4)=16cos⁡xsin⁡5x+16(38x−14sin⁡2x+132sin⁡4x)+CI(2,4) = \frac16 \cos x \sin^5 x + \frac16 \left( \frac38 x - \frac14 \sin 2x + \frac{1}{32} \sin 4x \right) + C I(2,4)=61​cosxsin5x+61​(83​x−41​sin2x+321​sin4x)+C

=16cos⁡xsin⁡5x+116x−124sin⁡2x+1192sin⁡4x+C= \frac16 \cos x \sin^5 x + \frac{1}{16} x - \frac{1}{24} \sin 2x + \frac{1}{192} \sin 4x + C =61​cosxsin5x+161​x−241​sin2x+1921​sin4x+C

所以：

∫cos⁡2xsin⁡4x dx=16cos⁡xsin⁡5x+116x−124sin⁡2x+1192sin⁡4x+C\boxed{\int \cos^2 x \sin^4 x \, dx = \frac16 \cos x \sin^5 x + \frac{1}{16} x - \frac{1}{24} \sin 2x + \frac{1}{192} \sin 4x + C} ∫cos2xsin4xdx=61​cosxsin5x+161​x−241​sin2x+1921​sin4x+C​

三⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

∫dx1+x4\int \frac{dx}{1+x^4} ∫1+x4dx​

解：

因式分解

x4+1=(x2+1)2−2x2=(x2+2x+1)(x2−2x+1)x^4 + 1 = (x^2 + 1)^2 - 2x^2 = (x^2 + \sqrt{2}x + 1)(x^2 - \sqrt{2}x + 1) x4+1=(x2+1)2−2x2=(x2+2​x+1)(x2−2​x+1)

部分分式展开

设

11+x4=Ax+Bx2+2x+1+Cx+Dx2−2x+1\frac{1}{1+x^4} = \frac{Ax + B}{x^2 + \sqrt{2}x + 1} + \frac{Cx + D}{x^2 - \sqrt{2}x + 1} 1+x41​=x2+2​x+1Ax+B​+x2−2​x+1Cx+D​

通分后比较分子：

1=(Ax+B)(x2−2x+1)+(Cx+D)(x2+2x+1)1 = (Ax + B)(x^2 - \sqrt{2}x + 1) + (Cx + D)(x^2 + \sqrt{2}x + 1) 1=(Ax+B)(x2−2​x+1)+(Cx+D)(x2+2​x+1)

展开得：

1=Ax3−2Ax2+Ax+Bx2−2Bx+B+Cx3+2Cx2+Cx+Dx2+2Dx+D\begin{aligned} 1 = & A x^3 - \sqrt{2}A x^2 + A x \\ & + B x^2 - \sqrt{2}B x + B \\ & + C x^3 + \sqrt{2}C x^2 + C x \\ & + D x^2 + \sqrt{2}D x + D \end{aligned} 1=​Ax3−2​Ax2+Ax+Bx2−2​Bx+B+Cx3+2​Cx2+Cx+Dx2+2​Dx+D​

合并同类项：

{x3:A+C=0x2:−2A+B+2C+D=0x1:A−2B+C+2D=0x0:B+D=1\begin{cases} x^3: & A + C = 0 \\ x^2: & -\sqrt{2}A + B + \sqrt{2}C + D = 0 \\ x^1: & A - \sqrt{2}B + C + \sqrt{2}D = 0 \\ x^0: & B + D = 1 \end{cases} ⎩⎪⎪⎪⎪⎨⎪⎪⎪⎪⎧​x3:x2:x1:x0:​A+C=0−2​A+B+2​C+D=0A−2​B+C+2​D=0B+D=1​

解得：

A=122,B=12,C=−122,D=12A = \frac{1}{2\sqrt{2}}, \quad B = \frac{1}{2}, \quad C = -\frac{1}{2\sqrt{2}}, \quad D = \frac{1}{2} A=22​1​,B=21​,C=−22​1​,D=21​

拆项积分

∫dx1+x4=122∫x+2x2+2x+1dx−122∫x−2x2−2x+1dx\int \frac{dx}{1+x^4} = \frac{1}{2\sqrt{2}} \int \frac{x + \sqrt{2}}{x^2 + \sqrt{2}x + 1} dx - \frac{1}{2\sqrt{2}} \int \frac{x - \sqrt{2}}{x^2 - \sqrt{2}x + 1} dx ∫1+x4dx​=22​1​∫x2+2​x+1x+2​​dx−22​1​∫x2−2​x+1x−2​​dx

第一项积分

配方：

x2+2x+1=(x+22)2+12x^2 + \sqrt{2}x + 1 = \left( x + \frac{\sqrt{2}}{2} \right)^2 + \frac{1}{2} x2+2​x+1=(x+22​​)2+21​

令 u=x+22，则x+2=u+22，dx=du。u = x + \frac{\sqrt{2}}{2}，则 x + \sqrt{2} = u + \frac{\sqrt{2}}{2}，dx = du。u=x+22​​，则x+2​=u+22​​，dx=du。

∫x+2x2+2x+1dx=∫u+22u2+12du=∫uu2+12du+22∫1u2+12du=12ln⁡(u2+12)+22⋅2arctan⁡(u1/2)+C1=12ln⁡(x2+2x+1)+arctan⁡(2x+1)+C1\begin{aligned} \int \frac{x + \sqrt{2}}{x^2 + \sqrt{2}x + 1} dx &= \int \frac{u + \frac{\sqrt{2}}{2}}{u^2 + \frac{1}{2}} du \\ &= \int \frac{u}{u^2 + \frac{1}{2}} du + \frac{\sqrt{2}}{2} \int \frac{1}{u^2 + \frac{1}{2}} du \\ &= \frac{1}{2} \ln\left( u^2 + \frac{1}{2} \right) + \frac{\sqrt{2}}{2} \cdot \sqrt{2} \arctan\left( \frac{u}{\sqrt{1/2}} \right) + C_1 \\ &= \frac{1}{2} \ln\left( x^2 + \sqrt{2}x + 1 \right) + \arctan\left( \sqrt{2}x + 1 \right) + C_1 \end{aligned} ∫x2+2​x+1x+2​​dx​=∫u2+21​u+22​​​du=∫u2+21​u​du+22​​∫u2+21​1​du=21​ln(u2+21​)+22​​⋅2​arctan(1/2​u​)+C1​=21​ln(x2+2​x+1)+arctan(2​x+1)+C1​​

第二项积分

配方：

x2−2x+1=(x−22)2+12x^2 - \sqrt{2}x + 1 = \left( x - \frac{\sqrt{2}}{2} \right)^2 + \frac{1}{2} x2−2​x+1=(x−22​​)2+21​

令 v=x−22，则x−2=v−22，dx=dv。v = x - \frac{\sqrt{2}}{2}，则 x - \sqrt{2} = v - \frac{\sqrt{2}}{2}，dx = dv。v=x−22​​，则x−2​=v−22​​，dx=dv。

∫x−2x2−2x+1dx=∫v−22v2+12dv=12ln⁡(v2+12)−arctan⁡(v1/2)+C2=12ln⁡(x2−2x+1)−arctan⁡(2x−1)+C2\begin{aligned} \int \frac{x - \sqrt{2}}{x^2 - \sqrt{2}x + 1} dx &= \int \frac{v - \frac{\sqrt{2}}{2}}{v^2 + \frac{1}{2}} dv \\ &= \frac{1}{2} \ln\left( v^2 + \frac{1}{2} \right) - \arctan\left( \frac{v}{\sqrt{1/2}} \right) + C_2 \\ &= \frac{1}{2} \ln\left( x^2 - \sqrt{2}x + 1 \right) - \arctan\left( \sqrt{2}x - 1 \right) + C_2 \end{aligned} ∫x2−2​x+1x−2​​dx​=∫v2+21​v−22​​​dv=21​ln(v2+21​)−arctan(1/2​v​)+C2​=21​ln(x2−2​x+1)−arctan(2​x−1)+C2​​

合并结果

∫dx1+x4=122[12ln⁡(x2+2x+1)+arctan⁡(2x+1)]−122[12ln⁡(x2−2x+1)−arctan⁡(2x−1)]+C\begin{aligned} \int \frac{dx}{1+x^4} &= \frac{1}{2\sqrt{2}} \left[ \frac{1}{2} \ln\left( x^2 + \sqrt{2}x + 1 \right) + \arctan\left( \sqrt{2}x + 1 \right) \right] \\ &\quad - \frac{1}{2\sqrt{2}} \left[ \frac{1}{2} \ln\left( x^2 - \sqrt{2}x + 1 \right) - \arctan\left( \sqrt{2}x - 1 \right) \right] + C \end{aligned} ∫1+x4dx​​=22​1​[21​ln(x2+2​x+1)+arctan(2​x+1)]−22​1​[21​ln(x2−2​x+1)−arctan(2​x−1)]+C​

整理得：

∫dx1+x4=122ln⁡x2+2x+1x2−2x+1+12arctan⁡(2x+1)+12arctan⁡(2x−1)+C\boxed{ \int \frac{dx}{1+x^4} = \frac{1}{2\sqrt{2}} \ln \frac{x^2 + \sqrt{2}x + 1}{x^2 - \sqrt{2}x + 1} + \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}} \arctan\left( \sqrt{2}x + 1 \right) + \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}} \arctan\left( \sqrt{2}x - 1 \right) + C } ∫1+x4dx​=22​1​lnx2−2​x+1x2+2​x+1​+2​1​arctan(2​x+1)+2​1​arctan(2​x−1)+C​

四⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

∫dx(x−1)(x2+1)2\int \frac{dx}{(x-1)(x^2+1)^2} ∫(x−1)(x2+1)2dx​

解：

部分分式展开

设

1(x−1)(x2+1)2=Ax−1+Bx+Cx2+1+Dx+E(x2+1)2\frac{1}{(x-1)(x^2+1)^2} = \frac{A}{x-1} + \frac{Bx + C}{x^2+1} + \frac{Dx + E}{(x^2+1)^2} (x−1)(x2+1)21​=x−1A​+x2+1Bx+C​+(x2+1)2Dx+E​

通分后比较分子：

1=A(x2+1)2+(Bx+C)(x−1)(x2+1)+(Dx+E)(x−1)1 = A(x^2+1)^2 + (Bx + C)(x-1)(x^2+1) + (Dx + E)(x-1) 1=A(x2+1)2+(Bx+C)(x−1)(x2+1)+(Dx+E)(x−1)

展开各项

A(x4+2x2+1)=Ax4+2Ax2+AA(x^4 + 2x^2 + 1) = Ax^4 + 2A x^2 + A A(x4+2x2+1)=Ax4+2Ax2+A

(Bx+C)(x−1)(x2+1)=(Bx+C)(x3−x2+x−1)(Bx + C)(x-1)(x^2+1) = (Bx + C)(x^3 - x^2 + x - 1) (Bx+C)(x−1)(x2+1)=(Bx+C)(x3−x2+x−1)

=Bx4+Cx3−Bx3−Cx2+Bx2+Cx−Bx−C= Bx^4 + Cx^3 - Bx^3 - Cx^2 + Bx^2 + Cx - Bx - C =Bx4+Cx3−Bx3−Cx2+Bx2+Cx−Bx−C

=Bx4+(C−B)x3+(−C+B)x2+(C−B)x−C= Bx^4 + (C - B)x^3 + (-C + B)x^2 + (C - B)x - C =Bx4+(C−B)x3+(−C+B)x2+(C−B)x−C

(Dx+E)(x−1)=Dx2+Ex−Dx−E=Dx2+(E−D)x−E(Dx + E)(x-1) = Dx^2 + Ex - Dx - E = Dx^2 + (E - D)x - E (Dx+E)(x−1)=Dx2+Ex−Dx−E=Dx2+(E−D)x−E

合并同类项

x4:A+Bx3:(C−B)x2:2A+(−C+B)+Dx1:(C−B)+(E−D)x0:A−C−E\begin{aligned} x^4: &\quad A + B \\ x^3: &\quad (C - B) \\ x^2: &\quad 2A + (-C + B) + D \\ x^1: &\quad (C - B) + (E - D) \\ x^0: &\quad A - C - E \end{aligned} x4:x3:x2:x1:x0:​A+B(C−B)2A+(−C+B)+D(C−B)+(E−D)A−C−E​

比较系数得方程组：

{A+B=0(1)C−B=0(2)2A−C+B+D=0(3)C−B+E−D=0(4)A−C−E=1(5)\begin{cases} A + B = 0 \quad &(1) \\ C - B = 0 \quad &(2) \\ 2A - C + B + D = 0 \quad &(3) \\ C - B + E - D = 0 \quad &(4) \\ A - C - E = 1 \quad &(5) \end{cases} ⎩⎪⎪⎪⎪⎪⎪⎪⎨⎪⎪⎪⎪⎪⎪⎪⎧​A+B=0C−B=02A−C+B+D=0C−B+E−D=0A−C−E=1​(1)(2)(3)(4)(5)​

解方程组

由 (1)(2) 得：

B=−A,C=B=−AB = -A, \quad C = B = -A B=−A,C=B=−A

代入 (3)：

2A−(−A)+(−A)+D=2A+A−A+D=2A+D=0⇒D=−2A2A - (-A) + (-A) + D = 2A + A - A + D = 2A + D = 0 \quad \Rightarrow \quad D = -2A 2A−(−A)+(−A)+D=2A+A−A+D=2A+D=0⇒D=−2A

代入 (4)：

(−A)−(−A)+E−(−2A)=0+0+E+2A=0⇒E=−2A(-A) - (-A) + E - (-2A) = 0 + 0 + E + 2A = 0 \quad \Rightarrow \quad E = -2A (−A)−(−A)+E−(−2A)=0+0+E+2A=0⇒E=−2A

代入 (5)：

A−(−A)−(−2A)=A+A+2A=4A=1⇒A=14A - (-A) - (-2A) = A + A + 2A = 4A = 1 \quad \Rightarrow \quad A = \frac{1}{4} A−(−A)−(−2A)=A+A+2A=4A=1⇒A=41​

因此：

A=14,B=−14,C=−14,D=−12,E=12A = \frac{1}{4},\quad B = -\frac{1}{4},\quad C = -\frac{1}{4},\quad D = -\frac{1}{2},\quad E = \frac{1}{2} A=41​,B=−41​,C=−41​,D=−21​,E=21​

拆项积分

[∫dx(x−1)(x2+1)2=14∫dxx−1⋅14∫x+1x2+1dx⋅12∫x−1(x2+1)2dx][ \int \frac{dx}{(x-1)(x^2+1)^2} = \frac{1}{4} \int \frac{dx}{x-1} · \frac{1}{4} \int \frac{x+1}{x^2+1} dx · \frac{1}{2} \int \frac{x-1}{(x^2+1)^2} dx ] [∫(x−1)(x2+1)2dx​=41​∫x−1dx​⋅41​∫x2+1x+1​dx⋅21​∫(x2+1)2x−1​dx]

分别计算

(i)

∫dxx−1=ln⁡∣x−1∣\int \frac{dx}{x-1} = \ln|x-1| ∫x−1dx​=ln∣x−1∣

(ii)

∫x+1x2+1dx=∫xx2+1dx+∫1x2+1dx\int \frac{x+1}{x^2+1} dx = \int \frac{x}{x^2+1} dx + \int \frac{1}{x^2+1} dx ∫x2+1x+1​dx=∫x2+1x​dx+∫x2+11​dx

=12ln⁡(x2+1)+arctan⁡x= \frac{1}{2} \ln(x^2+1) + \arctan x =21​ln(x2+1)+arctanx

(iii)

∫x−1(x2+1)2dx=∫x(x2+1)2dx−∫1(x2+1)2dx\int \frac{x-1}{(x^2+1)^2} dx = \int \frac{x}{(x^2+1)^2} dx - \int \frac{1}{(x^2+1)^2} dx ∫(x2+1)2x−1​dx=∫(x2+1)2x​dx−∫(x2+1)21​dx

先算第一项：

∫x(x2+1)2dx\int \frac{x}{(x^2+1)^2} dx ∫(x2+1)2x​dx

令u=x2+1，du=2xdx，则令 u = x^2+1，du = 2x dx，则令u=x2+1，du=2xdx，则

∫x(x2+1)2dx=12∫u−2du=−12u=−12(x2+1)\int \frac{x}{(x^2+1)^2} dx = \frac{1}{2} \int u^{-2} du = -\frac{1}{2u} = -\frac{1}{2(x^2+1)} ∫(x2+1)2x​dx=21​∫u−2du=−2u1​=−2(x2+1)1​

再算第二项：

∫1(x2+1)2dx\int \frac{1}{(x^2+1)^2} dx ∫(x2+1)21​dx

令 x=tan⁡t，dx=sec⁡2tdt，x2+1=sec⁡2tx = \tan t，dx = \sec^2 t dt，x^2+1 = \sec^2 tx=tant，dx=sec2tdt，x2+1=sec2t

∫1(x2+1)2dx=∫cos⁡2tdt=∫1+cos⁡2t2dt=t2+sin⁡2t4+C\int \frac{1}{(x^2+1)^2} dx = \int \cos^2 t dt = \int \frac{1+\cos 2t}{2} dt = \frac{t}{2} + \frac{\sin 2t}{4} + C ∫(x2+1)21​dx=∫cos2tdt=∫21+cos2t​dt=2t​+4sin2t​+C

=12arctan⁡x+12⋅x1+x2+C= \frac{1}{2} \arctan x + \frac{1}{2} \cdot \frac{x}{1+x^2} + C =21​arctanx+21​⋅1+x2x​+C

所以

∫x−1(x2+1)2dx=−12(x2+1)−12arctan⁡x−x2(1+x2)\int \frac{x-1}{(x^2+1)^2} dx = -\frac{1}{2(x^2+1)} - \frac{1}{2} \arctan x - \frac{x}{2(1+x^2)} ∫(x2+1)2x−1​dx=−2(x2+1)1​−21​arctanx−2(1+x2)x​

代入合并

原积分=14ln⁡∣x−1∣−14[12ln⁡(x2+1)+arctan⁡x]−12[−12(x2+1)−12arctan⁡x−x2(1+x2)]+C=14ln⁡∣x−1∣−18ln⁡(x2+1)−14arctan⁡x+14(x2+1)+14arctan⁡x+x4(1+x2)+C\begin{aligned} \text{原积分} &= \frac{1}{4} \ln|x-1| - \frac{1}{4} \left[ \frac{1}{2} \ln(x^2+1) + \arctan x \right] \\ &\quad - \frac{1}{2} \left[ -\frac{1}{2(x^2+1)} - \frac{1}{2} \arctan x - \frac{x}{2(1+x^2)} \right] + C \end{aligned} = \frac{1}{4} \ln|x-1| - \frac{1}{8} \ln(x^2+1) - \frac{1}{4} \arctan x + \frac{1}{4(x^2+1)} + \frac{1}{4} \arctan x + \frac{x}{4(1+x^2)} + C 原积分​=41​ln∣x−1∣−41​[21​ln(x2+1)+arctanx]−21​[−2(x2+1)1​−21​arctanx−2(1+x2)x​]+C​=41​ln∣x−1∣−81​ln(x2+1)−41​arctanx+4(x2+1)1​+41​arctanx+4(1+x2)x​+C

[⋅14arctan⁡x+14arctan⁡x抵消][ · \frac{1}{4} \arctan x + \frac{1}{4} \arctan x \quad \text{抵消} ] [⋅41​arctanx+41​arctanx抵消]

14(x2+1)+x4(1+x2)=1+x4(x2+1)\frac{1}{4(x^2+1)} + \frac{x}{4(1+x^2)} = \frac{1+x}{4(x^2+1)} 4(x2+1)1​+4(1+x2)x​=4(x2+1)1+x​

最终结果

∫dx(x−1)(x2+1)2=14ln⁡∣x−1∣−18ln⁡(x2+1)+x+14(x2+1)+C\boxed{ \int \frac{dx}{(x-1)(x^2+1)^2} = \frac{1}{4} \ln|x-1| - \frac{1}{8} \ln(x^2+1) + \frac{x+1}{4(x^2+1)} + C } ∫(x−1)(x2+1)2dx​=41​ln∣x−1∣−81​ln(x2+1)+4(x2+1)x+1​+C​

五⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

∫x−2(2x2+2x+1)2 dx\int \frac{x-2}{(2x^2+2x+1)^2} \, dx ∫(2x2+2x+1)2x−2​dx

解：

配方

2x2+2x+1=2(x2+x+12)=2[(x+12)2+14]2x^2 + 2x + 1 = 2\left( x^2 + x + \frac{1}{2} \right) = 2\left[ \left( x + \frac{1}{2} \right)^2 + \frac{1}{4} \right] 2x2+2x+1=2(x2+x+21​)=2[(x+21​)2+41​]

换元

令

u=x+12,x=u−12,dx=duu = x + \frac{1}{2}, \quad x = u - \frac{1}{2}, \quad dx = du u=x+21​,x=u−21​,dx=du

则

x−2=u−52x - 2 = u - \frac{5}{2} x−2=u−25​

2x2+2x+1=2(u2+14)2x^2 + 2x + 1 = 2\left( u^2 + \frac{1}{4} \right) 2x2+2x+1=2(u2+41​)

原积分化为

∫u−52[2(u2+14)]2 du=∫u−524(u2+14)2 du\int \frac{u - \frac{5}{2}}{\left[ 2\left( u^2 + \frac{1}{4} \right) \right]^2} \, du = \int \frac{u - \frac{5}{2}}{4\left( u^2 + \frac{1}{4} \right)^2} \, du ∫[2(u2+41​)]2u−25​​du=∫4(u2+41​)2u−25​​du

[=14∫u(u2+14)2,du⋅58∫1(u2+14)2,du][ = \frac{1}{4} \int \frac{u}{\left( u^2 + \frac{1}{4} \right)^2} , du · \frac{5}{8} \int \frac{1}{\left( u^2 + \frac{1}{4} \right)^2} , du ] [=41​∫(u2+41​)2u​,du⋅85​∫(u2+41​)21​,du]

记

I1=∫u(u2+14)2du,I2=∫1(u2+14)2duI_1 = \int \frac{u}{\left( u^2 + \frac{1}{4} \right)^2} du,\quad I_2 = \int \frac{1}{\left( u^2 + \frac{1}{4} \right)^2} du I1​=∫(u2+41​)2u​du,I2​=∫(u2+41​)21​du

计算 I1I_1I1​

令t=u2+14，则dt=2u du，u du=12dt令 t = u^2 + \frac{1}{4}，则 dt = 2u \, du，u\, du = \frac{1}{2} dt令t=u2+41​，则dt=2udu，udu=21​dt

I1=∫1t2⋅12dt=12∫t−2dt=12⋅t−1−1=−12tI_1 = \int \frac{1}{t^2} \cdot \frac{1}{2} dt = \frac{1}{2} \int t^{-2} dt = \frac{1}{2} \cdot \frac{t^{-1}}{-1} = -\frac{1}{2t} I1​=∫t21​⋅21​dt=21​∫t−2dt=21​⋅−1t−1​=−2t1​

=−12(u2+14)= -\frac{1}{2\left( u^2 + \frac{1}{4} \right)} =−2(u2+41​)1​

计算 I2I_2I2​

令u=12tan⁡θ，则令 u = \frac{1}{2} \tan \theta，则令u=21​tanθ，则

du=12sec⁡2θ dθdu = \frac{1}{2} \sec^2 \theta \, d\theta du=21​sec2θdθ

u2+14=14tan⁡2θ+14=14(tan⁡2θ+1)=14sec⁡2θu^2 + \frac{1}{4} = \frac{1}{4} \tan^2 \theta + \frac{1}{4} = \frac{1}{4} (\tan^2 \theta + 1) = \frac{1}{4} \sec^2 \thetau2+41​=41​tan2θ+41​=41​(tan2θ+1)=41​sec2θ

I2=∫1(14sec⁡2θ)2⋅12sec⁡2θ dθ=∫1116sec⁡4θ⋅12sec⁡2θ dθI_2 = \int \frac{1}{\left( \frac{1}{4} \sec^2 \theta \right)^2} \cdot \frac{1}{2} \sec^2 \theta \, d\theta = \int \frac{1}{\frac{1}{16} \sec^4 \theta} \cdot \frac{1}{2} \sec^2 \theta \, d\theta I2​=∫(41​sec2θ)21​⋅21​sec2θdθ=∫161​sec4θ1​⋅21​sec2θdθ

=∫16cos⁡4θ⋅12sec⁡2θ dθ=8∫cos⁡2θ dθ= \int 16 \cos^4 \theta \cdot \frac{1}{2} \sec^2 \theta \, d\theta = 8 \int \cos^2 \theta \, d\theta =∫16cos4θ⋅21​sec2θdθ=8∫cos2θdθ

∫cos⁡2θ dθ=12θ+14sin⁡2θ\int \cos^2 \theta \, d\theta = \frac{1}{2} \theta + \frac{1}{4} \sin 2\theta ∫cos2θdθ=21​θ+41​sin2θ

又

sin⁡2θ=2sin⁡θcos⁡θ=2⋅u12u2+14?\sin 2\theta = 2 \sin \theta \cos \theta = 2 \cdot \frac{u}{\frac{1}{2} \sqrt{u^2 + \frac{1}{4}}? } sin2θ=2sinθcosθ=2⋅21​u2+41​​?u​

更简单：由u=12tan⁡θ，得更简单：由 u = \frac{1}{2} \tan \theta，得更简单：由u=21​tanθ，得

sin⁡2θ=2tan⁡θ1+tan⁡2θ=2⋅2u1+4u2=4u1+4u2\sin 2\theta = \frac{2 \tan \theta}{1 + \tan^2 \theta} = \frac{2 \cdot 2u}{1 + 4u^2} = \frac{4u}{1+4u^2} sin2θ=1+tan2θ2tanθ​=1+4u22⋅2u​=1+4u24u​

所以

I2=8(12θ+14⋅4u1+4u2)=4θ+8u1+4u2I_2 = 8 \left( \frac{1}{2} \theta + \frac{1}{4} \cdot \frac{4u}{1+4u^2} \right) = 4\theta + \frac{8u}{1+4u^2} I2​=8(21​θ+41​⋅1+4u24u​)=4θ+1+4u28u​

=4arctan⁡(2u)+8u1+4u2= 4 \arctan(2u) + \frac{8u}{1+4u^2} =4arctan(2u)+1+4u28u​

代回 u

I1=−12(u2+14)=−12u2+12=−24u2+1I_1 = -\frac{1}{2\left( u^2 + \frac{1}{4} \right)} = -\frac{1}{2u^2 + \frac{1}{2}} = -\frac{2}{4u^2 + 1} I1​=−2(u2+41​)1​=−2u2+21​1​=−4u2+12​

I2=4arctan⁡(2u)+8u1+4u2I_2 = 4 \arctan(2u) + \frac{8u}{1+4u^2} I2​=4arctan(2u)+1+4u28u​

原积分

∫x−2(2x2+2x+1)2dx=14I1−58I2\int \frac{x-2}{(2x^2+2x+1)^2} dx = \frac{1}{4} I_1 - \frac{5}{8} I_2 ∫(2x2+2x+1)2x−2​dx=41​I1​−85​I2​

=14(−24u2+1)−58(4arctan⁡(2u)+8u1+4u2)= \frac{1}{4} \left( -\frac{2}{4u^2 + 1} \right) - \frac{5}{8} \left( 4 \arctan(2u) + \frac{8u}{1+4u^2} \right) =41​(−4u2+12​)−85​(4arctan(2u)+1+4u28u​)

=−12(4u2+1)−52arctan⁡(2u)−5u1+4u2= -\frac{1}{2(4u^2 + 1)} - \frac{5}{2} \arctan(2u) - \frac{5u}{1+4u^2} =−2(4u2+1)1​−25​arctan(2u)−1+4u25u​

换回 x

u=x+12，4u2+1=4(x+12)2+1=4(x2+x+14)+1=4x2+4x+1+1=4x2+4x+2u = x + \frac{1}{2}，4u^2 + 1 = 4\left( x + \frac{1}{2} \right)^2 + 1 = 4\left( x^2 + x + \frac{1}{4} \right) + 1 = 4x^2 + 4x + 1 + 1 = 4x^2 + 4x + 2 u=x+21​，4u2+1=4(x+21​)2+1=4(x2+x+41​)+1=4x2+4x+1+1=4x2+4x+2

而2x2+2x+1=12(4x2+4x+2)，所以而 2x^2 + 2x + 1 = \frac{1}{2}(4x^2 + 4x + 2)，所以而2x2+2x+1=21​(4x2+4x+2)，所以

−12(4x2+4x+2)=−14(2x2+2x+1)-\frac{1}{2(4x^2 + 4x + 2)} = -\frac{1}{4(2x^2 + 2x + 1)} −2(4x2+4x+2)1​=−4(2x2+2x+1)1​

5u1+4u2=5(x+12)4x2+4x+2=5(2x+1)2(4x2+4x+2)=5(2x+1)4(2x2+2x+1)\frac{5u}{1+4u^2} = \frac{5\left( x + \frac{1}{2} \right)}{4x^2 + 4x + 2} = \frac{5(2x+1)}{2(4x^2 + 4x + 2)} = \frac{5(2x+1)}{4(2x^2 + 2x + 1)} 1+4u25u​=4x2+4x+25(x+21​)​=2(4x2+4x+2)5(2x+1)​=4(2x2+2x+1)5(2x+1)​

arctan⁡(2u)=arctan⁡(2x+1)\arctan(2u) = \arctan(2x+1) arctan(2u)=arctan(2x+1)

最终结果

∫x−2(2x2+2x+1)2 dx=−52arctan⁡(2x+1)−5(2x+1)4(2x2+2x+1)−14(2x2+2x+1)+C\boxed{ \int \frac{x-2}{(2x^2+2x+1)^2} \, dx = -\frac{5}{2} \arctan(2x+1) - \frac{5(2x+1)}{4(2x^2+2x+1)} - \frac{1}{4(2x^2+2x+1)} + C } ∫(2x2+2x+1)2x−2​dx=−25​arctan(2x+1)−4(2x2+2x+1)5(2x+1)​−4(2x2+2x+1)1​+C​

可合并后两项：

=−52arctan⁡(2x+1)−5(2x+1)+14(2x2+2x+1)+C= -\frac{5}{2} \arctan(2x+1) - \frac{5(2x+1) + 1}{4(2x^2+2x+1)} + C =−25​arctan(2x+1)−4(2x2+2x+1)5(2x+1)+1​+C

六⭐⭐⭐⭐

∫cos⁡3xcos⁡x+sin⁡x dx\int \frac{\cos^3 x}{\cos x + \sin x} \, dx ∫cosx+sinxcos3x​dx

解：

对称性构造

考虑

I=∫cos⁡3xcos⁡x+sin⁡x dxI = \int \frac{\cos^3 x}{\cos x + \sin x} \, dx I=∫cosx+sinxcos3x​dx

令

J=∫sin⁡3xcos⁡x+sin⁡x dxJ = \int \frac{\sin^3 x}{\cos x + \sin x} \, dx J=∫cosx+sinxsin3x​dx

计算 I+JI + JI+J

I+J=∫cos⁡3x+sin⁡3xcos⁡x+sin⁡x dxI + J = \int \frac{\cos^3 x + \sin^3 x}{\cos x + \sin x} \, dx I+J=∫cosx+sinxcos3x+sin3x​dx

由立方和公式：

cos⁡3x+sin⁡3x=(cos⁡x+sin⁡x)(cos⁡2x−cos⁡xsin⁡x+sin⁡2x)\cos^3 x + \sin^3 x = (\cos x + \sin x)(\cos^2 x - \cos x \sin x + \sin^2 x) cos3x+sin3x=(cosx+sinx)(cos2x−cosxsinx+sin2x)

而cos⁡2x+sin⁡2x=1，所以而 \cos^2 x + \sin^2 x = 1，所以而cos2x+sin2x=1，所以

cos⁡3x+sin⁡3x=(cos⁡x+sin⁡x)(1−cos⁡xsin⁡x)\cos^3 x + \sin^3 x = (\cos x + \sin x)(1 - \cos x \sin x) cos3x+sin3x=(cosx+sinx)(1−cosxsinx)

因此

I+J=∫(1−cos⁡xsin⁡x) dx=∫1 dx−∫cos⁡xsin⁡x dxI + J = \int (1 - \cos x \sin x) \, dx = \int 1 \, dx - \int \cos x \sin x \, dx I+J=∫(1−cosxsinx)dx=∫1dx−∫cosxsinxdx

又

cos⁡xsin⁡x=12sin⁡2x\cos x \sin x = \frac{1}{2} \sin 2x cosxsinx=21​sin2x

所以

I+J=x−12∫sin⁡2x dx=x+14cos⁡2x+C1I + J = x - \frac{1}{2} \int \sin 2x \, dx = x + \frac{1}{4} \cos 2x + C_1 I+J=x−21​∫sin2xdx=x+41​cos2x+C1​

计算 I−JI - JI−J

I−J=∫cos⁡3x−sin⁡3xcos⁡x+sin⁡x dxI - J = \int \frac{\cos^3 x - \sin^3 x}{\cos x + \sin x} \, dx I−J=∫cosx+sinxcos3x−sin3x​dx

由立方差公式：

cos⁡3x−sin⁡3x=(cos⁡x−sin⁡x)(cos⁡2x+cos⁡xsin⁡x+sin⁡2x)=(cos⁡x−sin⁡x)(1+cos⁡xsin⁡x)\cos^3 x - \sin^3 x = (\cos x - \sin x)(\cos^2 x + \cos x \sin x + \sin^2 x) = (\cos x - \sin x)(1 + \cos x \sin x) cos3x−sin3x=(cosx−sinx)(cos2x+cosxsinx+sin2x)=(cosx−sinx)(1+cosxsinx)

所以

I−J=∫(cos⁡x−sin⁡x)(1+cos⁡xsin⁡x)cos⁡x+sin⁡x dxI - J = \int \frac{(\cos x - \sin x)(1 + \cos x \sin x)}{\cos x + \sin x} \, dx I−J=∫cosx+sinx(cosx−sinx)(1+cosxsinx)​dx

注意到

cos⁡x−sin⁡xcos⁡x+sin⁡x\frac{\cos x - \sin x}{\cos x + \sin x} cosx+sinxcosx−sinx​

可化简。

设

t=cos⁡x+sin⁡xt = \cos x + \sin x t=cosx+sinx

则

dt=(−sin⁡x+cos⁡x)dx=(cos⁡x−sin⁡x)dxdt = (-\sin x + \cos x) dx = (\cos x - \sin x) dx dt=(−sinx+cosx)dx=(cosx−sinx)dx

另外，

cos⁡xsin⁡x=t2−12\cos x \sin x = \frac{t^2 - 1}{2} cosxsinx=2t2−1​

因此

I−J=∫1+t2−12t dt=∫2+t2−12t dt=∫t2+12t dtI - J = \int \frac{1 + \frac{t^2 - 1}{2}}{t} \, dt = \int \frac{\frac{2 + t^2 - 1}{2}}{t} \, dt = \int \frac{t^2 + 1}{2t} \, dt I−J=∫t1+2t2−1​​dt=∫t22+t2−1​​dt=∫2tt2+1​dt

=12∫(t+1t)dt=12(t22+ln⁡∣t∣)+C2= \frac{1}{2} \int \left( t + \frac{1}{t} \right) dt = \frac{1}{2} \left( \frac{t^2}{2} + \ln|t| \right) + C_2 =21​∫(t+t1​)dt=21​(2t2​+ln∣t∣)+C2​

=t24+12ln⁡∣t∣+C2= \frac{t^2}{4} + \frac{1}{2} \ln|t| + C_2 =4t2​+21​ln∣t∣+C2​

代回t=cos⁡x+sin⁡x：代回 t = \cos x + \sin x：代回t=cosx+sinx：

I−J=(cos⁡x+sin⁡x)24+12ln⁡∣cos⁡x+sin⁡x∣+C2I - J = \frac{(\cos x + \sin x)^2}{4} + \frac{1}{2} \ln|\cos x + \sin x| + C_2 I−J=4(cosx+sinx)2​+21​ln∣cosx+sinx∣+C2​

而

(cos⁡x+sin⁡x)2=cos⁡2x+sin⁡2x+2cos⁡xsin⁡x=1+sin⁡2x(\cos x + \sin x)^2 = \cos^2 x + \sin^2 x + 2\cos x \sin x = 1 + \sin 2x (cosx+sinx)2=cos2x+sin2x+2cosxsinx=1+sin2x

解出 I

I=(I+J)+(I−J)2I = \frac{(I + J) + (I - J)}{2} I=2(I+J)+(I−J)​

代入：

I=12[x+14cos⁡2x+1+sin⁡2x4+12ln⁡∣cos⁡x+sin⁡x∣]+CI = \frac{1}{2} \left[ x + \frac{1}{4} \cos 2x + \frac{1 + \sin 2x}{4} + \frac{1}{2} \ln|\cos x + \sin x| \right] + C I=21​[x+41​cos2x+41+sin2x​+21​ln∣cosx+sinx∣]+C

合并常数：

I=x2+18cos⁡2x+18+18sin⁡2x+14ln⁡∣cos⁡x+sin⁡x∣+CI = \frac{x}{2} + \frac{1}{8} \cos 2x + \frac{1}{8} + \frac{1}{8} \sin 2x + \frac{1}{4} \ln|\cos x + \sin x| + C I=2x​+81​cos2x+81​+81​sin2x+41​ln∣cosx+sinx∣+C

常数18可并入C，而cos⁡2x和sin⁡2x可合并吗？不必，留此形式即可。常数 \frac{1}{8} 可并入 C，而 \cos 2x 和 \sin 2x 可合并吗？不必，留此形式即可。常数81​可并入C，而cos2x和sin2x可合并吗？不必，留此形式即可。

最终结果

∫cos⁡3xcos⁡x+sin⁡x dx=x2+18(sin⁡2x+cos⁡2x)+14ln⁡∣cos⁡x+sin⁡x∣+C\boxed{ \int \frac{\cos^3 x}{\cos x + \sin x} \, dx = \frac{x}{2} + \frac{1}{8} (\sin 2x + \cos 2x) + \frac{1}{4} \ln|\cos x + \sin x| + C } ∫cosx+sinxcos3x​dx=2x​+81​(sin2x+cos2x)+41​ln∣cosx+sinx∣+C​

七⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

∫1+x4(1−x4)3/2 dx\int \frac{1 + x^4}{(1 - x^4)^{3/2}} \, dx ∫(1−x4)3/21+x4​dx

解：

倒代换

令

x=1t,dx=−1t2dtx = \frac{1}{t}, \quad dx = -\frac{1}{t^2} dt x=t1​,dx=−t21​dt

代入原积分：

I=∫1+1t4(1−1t4)3/2⋅(−1t2)dtI = \int \frac{1 + \frac{1}{t^4}}{\left( 1 - \frac{1}{t^4} \right)^{3/2}} \cdot \left( -\frac{1}{t^2} \right) dt I=∫(1−t41​)3/21+t41​​⋅(−t21​)dt

化简被积函数

先处理分子：

1+1t4=t4+1t41 + \frac{1}{t^4} = \frac{t^4 + 1}{t^4} 1+t41​=t4t4+1​

分母：

(1−1t4)3/2=(t4−1t4)3/2=(t4−1)3/2(t4)3/2=(t4−1)3/2t6\left( 1 - \frac{1}{t^4} \right)^{3/2} = \left( \frac{t^4 - 1}{t^4} \right)^{3/2} = \frac{(t^4 - 1)^{3/2}}{(t^4)^{3/2}} = \frac{(t^4 - 1)^{3/2}}{t^6} (1−t41​)3/2=(t4t4−1​)3/2=(t4)3/2(t4−1)3/2​=t6(t4−1)3/2​

因此

1+1t4(1−1t4)3/2=t4+1t4(t4−1)3/2t6=t4+1t4⋅t6(t4−1)3/2=(t4+1)t2(t4−1)3/2\frac{1 + \frac{1}{t^4}}{\left( 1 - \frac{1}{t^4} \right)^{3/2}} = \frac{\frac{t^4 + 1}{t^4}}{\frac{(t^4 - 1)^{3/2}}{t^6}} = \frac{t^4 + 1}{t^4} \cdot \frac{t^6}{(t^4 - 1)^{3/2}} = \frac{(t^4 + 1) t^2}{(t^4 - 1)^{3/2}} (1−t41​)3/21+t41​​=t6(t4−1)3/2​t4t4+1​​=t4t4+1​⋅(t4−1)3/2t6​=(t4−1)3/2(t4+1)t2​

再乘以−1t2：再乘以 -\frac{1}{t^2}：再乘以−t21​：

I=−∫t4+1(t4−1)3/2 dtI = -\int \frac{t^4 + 1}{(t^4 - 1)^{3/2}} \, dt I=−∫(t4−1)3/2t4+1​dt

对称性发现

注意原积分

I=∫1+x4(1−x4)3/2 dxI = \int \frac{1 + x^4}{(1 - x^4)^{3/2}} \, dx I=∫(1−x4)3/21+x4​dx

经过倒代换后得到

I=−∫1+t4(1−t4)3/2 dtI = -\int \frac{1 + t^4}{(1 - t^4)^{3/2}} \, dt I=−∫(1−t4)3/21+t4​dt

但 t 是积分变量，与 x 无异，所以这意味着

I=−I+CI = -I + C I=−I+C

因此

2I=C⇒I=C22I = C \quad \Rightarrow \quad I = \frac{C}{2} 2I=C⇒I=2C​

但这不对，因为 C 是常数，但 I 显然不是常数函数。问题出在哪？

检查符号

关键在于：

(1−x4)3/2在倒代换后变成(1−1t4)3/2(1 - x^4)^{3/2} \quad \text{在倒代换后变成} \quad \left( 1 - \frac{1}{t^4} \right)^{3/2} (1−x4)3/2在倒代换后变成(1−t41​)3/2

而

1−1t4=t4−1t41 - \frac{1}{t^4} = \frac{t^4 - 1}{t^4} 1−t41​=t4t4−1​

注意 t4−1=−(1−t4)t^4 - 1 = -(1 - t^4)t4−1=−(1−t4)，所以

(t4−1t4)3/2=(−1−t4t4)3/2=(−1)3/2(1−t4t4)3/2\left( \frac{t^4 - 1}{t^4} \right)^{3/2} = \left( -\frac{1 - t^4}{t^4} \right)^{3/2} = (-1)^{3/2} \left( \frac{1 - t^4}{t^4} \right)^{3/2} (t4t4−1​)3/2=(−t41−t4​)3/2=(−1)3/2(t41−t4​)3/2

而 (−1)3/2=(i2)3/2=i3=−i(-1)^{3/2} = (i^2)^{3/2} = i^3 = -i(−1)3/2=(i2)3/2=i3=−i，这引入了复数，说明直接倒代换会涉及分支问题。

因此这个积分不宜用倒代换直接循环求解，而应改用三角代换。

改用三角代换

令 x2=sin⁡θ，则x=sin⁡θ，但这样代换会导致根号，更复杂。改用x2=cos⁡θ更合适。x^2 = \sin \theta，则 x = \sqrt{\sin \theta}，但这样代换会导致根号，更复杂。改用 x^2 = \cos \theta 更合适。x2=sinθ，则x=sinθ​，但这样代换会导致根号，更复杂。改用x2=cosθ更合适。

令

x2=cos⁡θ,x=cos⁡θ,dx=−sin⁡θ2cos⁡θdθx^2 = \cos \theta, \quad x = \sqrt{\cos \theta}, \quad dx = \frac{-\sin \theta}{2\sqrt{\cos \theta}} d\theta x2=cosθ,x=cosθ​,dx=2cosθ​−sinθ​dθ

则

1−x4=1−cos⁡2θ=sin⁡2θ1 - x^4 = 1 - \cos^2 \theta = \sin^2 \theta 1−x4=1−cos2θ=sin2θ

(1−x4)3/2=(sin⁡2θ)3/2=sin⁡3θ(1 - x^4)^{3/2} = (\sin^2 \theta)^{3/2} = \sin^3 \theta (1−x4)3/2=(sin2θ)3/2=sin3θ

1+x4=1+cos⁡2θ1 + x^4 = 1 + \cos^2 \theta 1+x4=1+cos2θ

代入：

I=∫1+cos⁡2θsin⁡3θ⋅−sin⁡θ2cos⁡θdθ=−12∫1+cos⁡2θsin⁡2θ⋅1cos⁡θdθI = \int \frac{1 + \cos^2 \theta}{\sin^3 \theta} \cdot \frac{-\sin \theta}{2\sqrt{\cos \theta}} d\theta = -\frac{1}{2} \int \frac{1 + \cos^2 \theta}{\sin^2 \theta} \cdot \frac{1}{\sqrt{\cos \theta}} d\theta I=∫sin3θ1+cos2θ​⋅2cosθ​−sinθ​dθ=−21​∫sin2θ1+cos2θ​⋅cosθ​1​dθ

而

1+cos⁡2θsin⁡2θ=1sin⁡2θ+cot⁡2θ=csc⁡2θ+cot⁡2θ\frac{1 + \cos^2 \theta}{\sin^2 \theta} = \frac{1}{\sin^2 \theta} + \cot^2 \theta = \csc^2 \theta + \cot^2 \theta sin2θ1+cos2θ​=sin2θ1​+cot2θ=csc2θ+cot2θ

但这样仍然复杂，且含有cos⁡θ，不是好选择。但这样仍然复杂，且含有\sqrt{\cos \theta}，不是好选择。但这样仍然复杂，且含有cosθ​，不是好选择。

正确的三角代换

观察 1−x41 - x^41−x4，可令

x2=cos⁡2θ或x2=1−t1+tx^2 = \cos 2\theta \quad \text{或} \quad x^2 = \frac{1 - t}{1 + t} x2=cos2θ或x2=1+t1−t​

更常见的是令

x2=1−t1+tx^2 = \frac{1 - t}{1 + t} x2=1+t1−t​

这是 Euler 代换的一种。

但此处最简洁的三角代换是：
令

x2=cos⁡2θ,x=cos⁡2θ,dx=−sin⁡2θcos⁡2θdθx^2 = \cos 2\theta, \quad x = \sqrt{\cos 2\theta}, \quad dx = \frac{-\sin 2\theta}{\sqrt{\cos 2\theta}} d\theta x2=cos2θ,x=cos2θ​,dx=cos2θ​−sin2θ​dθ

则

1−x4=1−cos⁡22θ=sin⁡22θ1 - x^4 = 1 - \cos^2 2\theta = \sin^2 2\theta 1−x4=1−cos22θ=sin22θ

(1−x4)3/2=sin⁡32θ(1 - x^4)^{3/2} = \sin^3 2\theta (1−x4)3/2=sin32θ

1+x4=1+cos⁡22θ1 + x^4 = 1 + \cos^2 2\theta 1+x4=1+cos22θ

代入：

I=∫1+cos⁡22θsin⁡32θ⋅−sin⁡2θcos⁡2θdθ=−∫1+cos⁡22θsin⁡22θ⋅1cos⁡2θdθI = \int \frac{1 + \cos^2 2\theta}{\sin^3 2\theta} \cdot \frac{-\sin 2\theta}{\sqrt{\cos 2\theta}} d\theta = -\int \frac{1 + \cos^2 2\theta}{\sin^2 2\theta} \cdot \frac{1}{\sqrt{\cos 2\theta}} d\theta I=∫sin32θ1+cos22θ​⋅cos2θ​−sin2θ​dθ=−∫sin22θ1+cos22θ​⋅cos2θ​1​dθ

而

1+cos⁡22θsin⁡22θ=1+cos⁡22θ1−cos⁡22θ\frac{1 + \cos^2 2\theta}{\sin^2 2\theta} = \frac{1 + \cos^2 2\theta}{1 - \cos^2 2\theta} sin22θ1+cos22θ​=1−cos22θ1+cos22θ​

设u=cos⁡2θ，则du=−2sin⁡2θdθ，但这里我们有1cos⁡2θ，无法直接换元。这代换也不理想。设 u = \cos 2\theta，则 du = -2\sin 2\theta d\theta，但这里我们有 \frac{1}{\sqrt{\cos 2\theta}}，无法直接换元。这代换也不理想。设u=cos2θ，则du=−2sin2θdθ，但这里我们有cos2θ​1​，无法直接换元。这代换也不理想。

改用万能双曲代换

实际上，∫1+x4(1−x4)3/2dx的标准解法是令实际上，\int \frac{1 + x^4}{(1 - x^4)^{3/2}} dx 的标准解法是令实际上，∫(1−x4)3/21+x4​dx的标准解法是令

x2=1−t1+tx^2 = \frac{1 - t}{1 + t} x2=1+t1−t​

这是 Euler 代换的一种。但计算量很大，竞赛题中常直接给出结果。

最终结果（已知公式）

查积分表可知：

∫1+x4(1−x4)3/2dx=x1−x4+C\int \frac{1 + x^4}{(1 - x^4)^{3/2}} dx = \frac{x}{\sqrt{1 - x^4}} + C ∫(1−x4)3/21+x4​dx=1−x4​x​+C

验证：对x1−x4求导：验证：对 \frac{x}{\sqrt{1 - x^4}} 求导：验证：对1−x4​x​求导：

ddx(x1−x4)=1−x4−x⋅−4x321−x41−x4=1−x4+2x4(1−x4)3/2=1+x4(1−x4)3/2\frac{d}{dx} \left( \frac{x}{\sqrt{1 - x^4}} \right) = \frac{\sqrt{1 - x^4} - x \cdot \frac{-4x^3}{2\sqrt{1 - x^4}}}{1 - x^4} = \frac{1 - x^4 + 2x^4}{(1 - x^4)^{3/2}} = \frac{1 + x^4}{(1 - x^4)^{3/2}} dxd​(1−x4​x​)=1−x41−x4​−x⋅21−x4​−4x3​​=(1−x4)3/21−x4+2x4​=(1−x4)3/21+x4​

成立！

最终答案

∫1+x4(1−x4)3/2 dx=x1−x4+C\boxed{ \int \frac{1 + x^4}{(1 - x^4)^{3/2}} \, dx = \frac{x}{\sqrt{1 - x^4}} + C } ∫(1−x4)3/21+x4​dx=1−x4​x​+C​

八⭐⭐⭐⭐

∫dx1+x3\int \frac{dx}{1+x^3} ∫1+x3dx​

解：

因式分解

1+x3=(x+1)(x2−x+1)1 + x^3 = (x + 1)(x^2 - x + 1) 1+x3=(x+1)(x2−x+1)

部分分式展开

设

11+x3=Ax+1+Bx+Cx2−x+1\frac{1}{1+x^3} = \frac{A}{x+1} + \frac{Bx + C}{x^2 - x + 1} 1+x31​=x+1A​+x2−x+1Bx+C​

通分后比较分子：

1=A(x2−x+1)+(Bx+C)(x+1)1 = A(x^2 - x + 1) + (Bx + C)(x + 1) 1=A(x2−x+1)+(Bx+C)(x+1)

展开右边：

Ax2−Ax+A+Bx2+Bx+Cx+CA x^2 - A x + A + B x^2 + B x + C x + C Ax2−Ax+A+Bx2+Bx+Cx+C

=(A+B)x2+(−A+B+C)x+(A+C)= (A + B)x^2 + (-A + B + C)x + (A + C) =(A+B)x2+(−A+B+C)x+(A+C)

比较系数：

{A+B=0(1)−A+B+C=0(2)A+C=1(3)\begin{cases} A + B = 0 \quad &(1) \\ -A + B + C = 0 \quad &(2) \\ A + C = 1 \quad &(3) \end{cases} ⎩⎪⎪⎨⎪⎪⎧​A+B=0−A+B+C=0A+C=1​(1)(2)(3)​

解方程组

由 (1) 得 B = -A

代入 (2)：−A+(−A)+C=−2A+C=0⇒C=2A-A + (-A) + C = -2A + C = 0 \Rightarrow C = 2A−A+(−A)+C=−2A+C=0⇒C=2A

代入 (3)：A+2A=3A=1⇒A=13A + 2A = 3A = 1 \Rightarrow A = \frac{1}{3}A+2A=3A=1⇒A=31​

于是

A=13,B=−13,C=23A = \frac{1}{3},\quad B = -\frac{1}{3},\quad C = \frac{2}{3} A=31​,B=−31​,C=32​

拆项积分

∫dx1+x3=13∫dxx+1−13∫x−2x2−x+1 dx\int \frac{dx}{1+x^3} = \frac{1}{3} \int \frac{dx}{x+1} - \frac{1}{3} \int \frac{x - 2}{x^2 - x + 1} \, dx ∫1+x3dx​=31​∫x+1dx​−31​∫x2−x+1x−2​dx

注意：因为Bx+C=−13x+23=−13(x−2)注意：因为 Bx + C = -\frac{1}{3}x + \frac{2}{3} = -\frac{1}{3}(x - 2)注意：因为Bx+C=−31​x+32​=−31​(x−2)

第一项积分

∫dxx+1=ln⁡∣x+1∣\int \frac{dx}{x+1} = \ln|x+1| ∫x+1dx​=ln∣x+1∣

第二项积分

先配方：

x2−x+1=(x−12)2+34x^2 - x + 1 = \left( x - \frac{1}{2} \right)^2 + \frac{3}{4} x2−x+1=(x−21​)2+43​

令u=x−12，则x−2=u−32，dx=du令 u = x - \frac{1}{2}，则 x - 2 = u - \frac{3}{2}，dx = du令u=x−21​，则x−2=u−23​，dx=du

∫x−2x2−x+1dx=∫u−32u2+34du\int \frac{x - 2}{x^2 - x + 1} dx = \int \frac{u - \frac{3}{2}}{u^2 + \frac{3}{4}} du ∫x2−x+1x−2​dx=∫u2+43​u−23​​du

=∫uu2+34du−32∫1u2+34du= \int \frac{u}{u^2 + \frac{3}{4}} du - \frac{3}{2} \int \frac{1}{u^2 + \frac{3}{4}} du =∫u2+43​u​du−23​∫u2+43​1​du

第一项：∫uu2+34du=12ln⁡(u2+34)\int \frac{u}{u^2 + \frac{3}{4}} du = \frac{1}{2} \ln\left( u^2 + \frac{3}{4} \right)∫u2+43​u​du=21​ln(u2+43​)

第二项：∫1u2+34du=13/4arctan⁡(u3/4)=23arctan⁡(2u3)\int \frac{1}{u^2 + \frac{3}{4}} du = \frac{1}{\sqrt{3/4}} \arctan\left( \frac{u}{\sqrt{3/4}} \right) = \frac{2}{\sqrt{3}} \arctan\left( \frac{2u}{\sqrt{3}} \right)∫u2+43​1​du=3/4​1​arctan(3/4​u​)=3​2​arctan(3​2u​)

所以

∫x−2x2−x+1dx=12ln⁡(x2−x+1)−32⋅23arctan⁡(2x−13)+C2\int \frac{x - 2}{x^2 - x + 1} dx = \frac{1}{2} \ln\left( x^2 - x + 1 \right) - \frac{3}{2} \cdot \frac{2}{\sqrt{3}} \arctan\left( \frac{2x - 1}{\sqrt{3}} \right) + C_2 ∫x2−x+1x−2​dx=21​ln(x2−x+1)−23​⋅3​2​arctan(3​2x−1​)+C2​

=12ln⁡(x2−x+1)−3arctan⁡(2x−13)+C2= \frac{1}{2} \ln\left( x^2 - x + 1 \right) - \sqrt{3} \arctan\left( \frac{2x - 1}{\sqrt{3}} \right) + C_2 =21​ln(x2−x+1)−3​arctan(3​2x−1​)+C2​

代回原式

∫dx1+x3=13ln⁡∣x+1∣−13[12ln⁡(x2−x+1)−3arctan⁡(2x−13)]+C=13ln⁡∣x+1∣−16ln⁡(x2−x+1)+33arctan⁡(2x−13)+C\int \frac{dx}{1+x^3} = \frac{1}{3} \ln|x+1| - \frac{1}{3} \left[ \frac{1}{2} \ln\left( x^2 - x + 1 \right) - \sqrt{3} \arctan\left( \frac{2x - 1}{\sqrt{3}} \right) \right] + C = \frac{1}{3} \ln|x+1| - \frac{1}{6} \ln\left( x^2 - x + 1 \right) + \frac{\sqrt{3}}{3} \arctan\left( \frac{2x - 1}{\sqrt{3}} \right) + C ∫1+x3dx​=31​ln∣x+1∣−31​[21​ln(x2−x+1)−3​arctan(3​2x−1​)]+C=31​ln∣x+1∣−61​ln(x2−x+1)+33​​arctan(3​2x−1​)+C

最终结果

∫dx1+x3=13ln⁡∣x+1∣−16ln⁡(x2−x+1)+33arctan⁡(2x−13)+C\boxed{ \int \frac{dx}{1+x^3} = \frac{1}{3} \ln|x+1| - \frac{1}{6} \ln(x^2 - x + 1) + \frac{\sqrt{3}}{3} \arctan\left( \frac{2x-1}{\sqrt{3}} \right) + C } ∫1+x3dx​=31​ln∣x+1∣−61​ln(x2−x+1)+33​​arctan(3​2x−1​)+C​

九⭐⭐⭐⭐

∫tan⁡x1+tan⁡x+tan⁡2x dx\int \frac{\tan x}{1 + \tan x + \tan^2 x} \, dx ∫1+tanx+tan2xtanx​dx

解：

万能代换

令

t=tan⁡x,x=arctan⁡t,dx=11+t2dtt = \tan x, \quad x = \arctan t, \quad dx = \frac{1}{1+t^2} dt t=tanx,x=arctant,dx=1+t21​dt

原积分化为

I=∫t1+t+t2⋅11+t2 dt=∫t(t2+t+1)(t2+1) dtI = \int \frac{t}{1 + t + t^2} \cdot \frac{1}{1+t^2} \, dt = \int \frac{t}{(t^2 + t + 1)(t^2 + 1)} \, dt I=∫1+t+t2t​⋅1+t21​dt=∫(t2+t+1)(t2+1)t​dt

部分分式展开

设

t(t2+t+1)(t2+1)=At+Bt2+t+1+Ct+Dt2+1\frac{t}{(t^2 + t + 1)(t^2 + 1)} = \frac{At + B}{t^2 + t + 1} + \frac{Ct + D}{t^2 + 1} (t2+t+1)(t2+1)t​=t2+t+1At+B​+t2+1Ct+D​

通分后比较分子：

t=(At+B)(t2+1)+(Ct+D)(t2+t+1)t = (At + B)(t^2 + 1) + (Ct + D)(t^2 + t + 1) t=(At+B)(t2+1)+(Ct+D)(t2+t+1)

展开右边：

(At+B)(t2+1)=At3+Bt2+At+B(At + B)(t^2 + 1) = A t^3 + B t^2 + A t + B (At+B)(t2+1)=At3+Bt2+At+B

(Ct+D)(t2+t+1)=Ct3+Ct2+Ct+Dt2+Dt+D(Ct + D)(t^2 + t + 1) = C t^3 + C t^2 + C t + D t^2 + D t + D (Ct+D)(t2+t+1)=Ct3+Ct2+Ct+Dt2+Dt+D

=Ct3+(C+D)t2+(C+D)t+D= C t^3 + (C + D) t^2 + (C + D) t + D =Ct3+(C+D)t2+(C+D)t+D

合并同类项：

t3:A+C=0t^3: \quad A + C = 0 t3:A+C=0

t2:B+C+D=0t^2: \quad B + C + D = 0 t2:B+C+D=0

t1:A+C+D=1t^1: \quad A + C + D = 1 t1:A+C+D=1

t0:B+D=0t^0: \quad B + D = 0 t0:B+D=0

解方程组

由 B + D = 0 得 D = -B

由 A + C = 0 得 C = -A

代入 B + C + D = 0：

B+(−A)+(−B)=−A=0⇒A=0B + (-A) + (-B) = -A = 0 \Rightarrow A = 0 B+(−A)+(−B)=−A=0⇒A=0

于是 C = 0

代入 A + C + D = 1：

0+0+D=1⇒D=10 + 0 + D = 1 \Rightarrow D = 1 0+0+D=1⇒D=1

由D=−B得B=−1由 D = -B 得 B = -1 由D=−B得B=−1

所以

A=0,B=−1,C=0,D=1A = 0,\quad B = -1,\quad C = 0,\quad D = 1 A=0,B=−1,C=0,D=1

因此

t(t2+t+1)(t2+1)=−1t2+t+1+1t2+1\frac{t}{(t^2 + t + 1)(t^2 + 1)} = \frac{-1}{t^2 + t + 1} + \frac{1}{t^2 + 1} (t2+t+1)(t2+1)t​=t2+t+1−1​+t2+11​

拆项积分

I=−∫1t2+t+1 dt+∫1t2+1 dtI = -\int \frac{1}{t^2 + t + 1} \, dt + \int \frac{1}{t^2 + 1} \, dt I=−∫t2+t+11​dt+∫t2+11​dt

第一项积分

配方：

t2+t+1=(t+12)2+34t^2 + t + 1 = \left( t + \frac{1}{2} \right)^2 + \frac{3}{4} t2+t+1=(t+21​)2+43​

令u=t+12，则令 u = t + \frac{1}{2}，则令u=t+21​，则

∫1t2+t+1dt=∫1u2+(32)2du=23arctan⁡(2u3)+C1\int \frac{1}{t^2 + t + 1} dt = \int \frac{1}{u^2 + (\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2})^2} du = \frac{2}{\sqrt{3}} \arctan\left( \frac{2u}{\sqrt{3}} \right) + C_1 ∫t2+t+11​dt=∫u2+(23​​)21​du=3​2​arctan(3​2u​)+C1​

=23arctan⁡(2t+13)+C1= \frac{2}{\sqrt{3}} \arctan\left( \frac{2t + 1}{\sqrt{3}} \right) + C_1 =3​2​arctan(3​2t+1​)+C1​

第二项积分

∫1t2+1dt=arctan⁡t+C2\int \frac{1}{t^2 + 1} dt = \arctan t + C_2 ∫t2+11​dt=arctant+C2​

代回

I=−23arctan⁡(2t+13)+arctan⁡t+CI = -\frac{2}{\sqrt{3}} \arctan\left( \frac{2t + 1}{\sqrt{3}} \right) + \arctan t + C I=−3​2​arctan(3​2t+1​)+arctant+C

换回 x

t=tan⁡x，所以t = \tan x，所以t=tanx，所以

∫tan⁡x1+tan⁡x+tan⁡2x dx=arctan⁡(tan⁡x)−23arctan⁡(2tan⁡x+13)+C\int \frac{\tan x}{1 + \tan x + \tan^2 x} \, dx = \arctan(\tan x) - \frac{2}{\sqrt{3}} \arctan\left( \frac{2\tan x + 1}{\sqrt{3}} \right) + C ∫1+tanx+tan2xtanx​dx=arctan(tanx)−3​2​arctan(3​2tanx+1​)+C

注意arctan⁡(tan⁡x)=x（在适当区间内），故注意 \arctan(\tan x) = x（在适当区间内），故注意arctan(tanx)=x（在适当区间内），故

∫tan⁡x1+tan⁡x+tan⁡2x dx=x−23arctan⁡(2tan⁡x+13)+C\boxed{ \int \frac{\tan x}{1 + \tan x + \tan^2 x} \, dx = x - \frac{2}{\sqrt{3}} \arctan\left( \frac{2\tan x + 1}{\sqrt{3}} \right) + C } ∫1+tanx+tan2xtanx​dx=x−3​2​arctan(3​2tanx+1​)+C​

十⭐⭐⭐⭐

∫dxx4+x2+1\int \frac{dx}{x^4 + x^2 + 1} ∫x4+x2+1dx​

解：

因式分解

x4+x2+1=(x4+2x2+1)−x2=(x2+1)2−x2x^4 + x^2 + 1 = (x^4 + 2x^2 + 1) - x^2 = (x^2 + 1)^2 - x^2 x4+x2+1=(x4+2x2+1)−x2=(x2+1)2−x2

=(x2+x+1)(x2−x+1)= (x^2 + x + 1)(x^2 - x + 1) =(x2+x+1)(x2−x+1)

部分分式展开

设

1x4+x2+1=Ax+Bx2+x+1+Cx+Dx2−x+1\frac{1}{x^4 + x^2 + 1} = \frac{Ax + B}{x^2 + x + 1} + \frac{Cx + D}{x^2 - x + 1} x4+x2+11​=x2+x+1Ax+B​+x2−x+1Cx+D​

通分后比较分子：

1=(Ax+B)(x2−x+1)+(Cx+D)(x2+x+1)1 = (Ax + B)(x^2 - x + 1) + (Cx + D)(x^2 + x + 1) 1=(Ax+B)(x2−x+1)+(Cx+D)(x2+x+1)

展开右边：

(Ax+B)(x2−x+1)=Ax3−Ax2+Ax+Bx2−Bx+B(Ax + B)(x^2 - x + 1) = A x^3 - A x^2 + A x + B x^2 - B x + B (Ax+B)(x2−x+1)=Ax3−Ax2+Ax+Bx2−Bx+B

=Ax3+(−A+B)x2+(A−B)x+B= A x^3 + (-A + B) x^2 + (A - B) x + B =Ax3+(−A+B)x2+(A−B)x+B

(Cx+D)(x2+x+1)=Cx3+Cx2+Cx+Dx2+Dx+D(Cx + D)(x^2 + x + 1) = C x^3 + C x^2 + C x + D x^2 + D x + D (Cx+D)(x2+x+1)=Cx3+Cx2+Cx+Dx2+Dx+D

=Cx3+(C+D)x2+(C+D)x+D= C x^3 + (C + D) x^2 + (C + D) x + D =Cx3+(C+D)x2+(C+D)x+D

相加得：

x3:A+C=0x^3: \quad A + C = 0 x3:A+C=0

x2:−A+B+C+D=0x^2: \quad -A + B + C + D = 0 x2:−A+B+C+D=0

x1:A−B+C+D=0x^1: \quad A - B + C + D = 0 x1:A−B+C+D=0

x0:B+D=1x^0: \quad B + D = 1 x0:B+D=1

解方程组

由 A + C = 0 得 C = -A

由 B + D = 1 得 D = 1 - B

代入x2系数方程：代入 x^2 系数方程：代入x2系数方程：

−A+B+(−A)+(1−B)=−2A+1=0⇒A=12-A + B + (-A) + (1 - B) = -2A + 1 = 0 \Rightarrow A = \frac{1}{2} −A+B+(−A)+(1−B)=−2A+1=0⇒A=21​

于是C=−12于是 C = -\frac{1}{2}于是C=−21​

代入x1系数方程：代入 x^1 系数方程：代入x1系数方程：

A−B+C+D=12−B−12+(1−B)=1−2B=0⇒B=12A - B + C + D = \frac{1}{2} - B - \frac{1}{2} + (1 - B) = 1 - 2B = 0 \Rightarrow B = \frac{1}{2} A−B+C+D=21​−B−21​+(1−B)=1−2B=0⇒B=21​

于是D=1−12=12于是 D = 1 - \frac{1}{2} = \frac{1}{2}于是D=1−21​=21​

所以

A=12,B=12,C=−12,D=12A = \frac{1}{2},\quad B = \frac{1}{2},\quad C = -\frac{1}{2},\quad D = \frac{1}{2} A=21​,B=21​,C=−21​,D=21​

因此

1x4+x2+1=12x+12x2+x+1+−12x+12x2−x+1\frac{1}{x^4 + x^2 + 1} = \frac{\frac{1}{2}x + \frac{1}{2}}{x^2 + x + 1} + \frac{-\frac{1}{2}x + \frac{1}{2}}{x^2 - x + 1} x4+x2+11​=x2+x+121​x+21​​+x2−x+1−21​x+21​​

=12⋅x+1x2+x+1−12⋅x−1x2−x+1= \frac{1}{2} \cdot \frac{x + 1}{x^2 + x + 1} - \frac{1}{2} \cdot \frac{x - 1}{x^2 - x + 1} =21​⋅x2+x+1x+1​−21​⋅x2−x+1x−1​

拆项积分

I=12∫x+1x2+x+1dx−12∫x−1x2−x+1dxI = \frac{1}{2} \int \frac{x + 1}{x^2 + x + 1} dx - \frac{1}{2} \int \frac{x - 1}{x^2 - x + 1} dx I=21​∫x2+x+1x+1​dx−21​∫x2−x+1x−1​dx

第一项积分

对x2+x+1配方：对 x^2 + x + 1 配方：对x2+x+1配方：

x2+x+1=(x+12)2+34x^2 + x + 1 = \left( x + \frac{1}{2} \right)^2 + \frac{3}{4} x2+x+1=(x+21​)2+43​

分子x+1=(x+12)+12分子 x + 1 = \left( x + \frac{1}{2} \right) + \frac{1}{2}分子x+1=(x+21​)+21​

设u=x+12，则设 u = x + \frac{1}{2}，则设u=x+21​，则

∫x+1x2+x+1dx=∫u+12u2+34du\int \frac{x + 1}{x^2 + x + 1} dx = \int \frac{u + \frac{1}{2}}{u^2 + \frac{3}{4}} du ∫x2+x+1x+1​dx=∫u2+43​u+21​​du

=∫uu2+34du+12∫1u2+34du= \int \frac{u}{u^2 + \frac{3}{4}} du + \frac{1}{2} \int \frac{1}{u^2 + \frac{3}{4}} du =∫u2+43​u​du+21​∫u2+43​1​du

第一项：

∫uu2+34du=12ln⁡(u2+34)\int \frac{u}{u^2 + \frac{3}{4}} du = \frac{1}{2} \ln\left( u^2 + \frac{3}{4} \right) ∫u2+43​u​du=21​ln(u2+43​)

第二项：

∫1u2+34du=23arctan⁡(2u3)\int \frac{1}{u^2 + \frac{3}{4}} du = \frac{2}{\sqrt{3}} \arctan\left( \frac{2u}{\sqrt{3}} \right) ∫u2+43​1​du=3​2​arctan(3​2u​)

所以

∫x+1x2+x+1dx=12ln⁡(x2+x+1)+12⋅23arctan⁡(2x+13)+C1\int \frac{x + 1}{x^2 + x + 1} dx = \frac{1}{2} \ln\left( x^2 + x + 1 \right) + \frac{1}{2} \cdot \frac{2}{\sqrt{3}} \arctan\left( \frac{2x + 1}{\sqrt{3}} \right) + C_1 ∫x2+x+1x+1​dx=21​ln(x2+x+1)+21​⋅3​2​arctan(3​2x+1​)+C1​

=12ln⁡(x2+x+1)+13arctan⁡(2x+13)+C1= \frac{1}{2} \ln\left( x^2 + x + 1 \right) + \frac{1}{\sqrt{3}} \arctan\left( \frac{2x + 1}{\sqrt{3}} \right) + C_1 =21​ln(x2+x+1)+3​1​arctan(3​2x+1​)+C1​

第二项积分

对x2−x+1配方：对 x^2 - x + 1 配方：对x2−x+1配方：

x2−x+1=(x−12)2+34x^2 - x + 1 = \left( x - \frac{1}{2} \right)^2 + \frac{3}{4} x2−x+1=(x−21​)2+43​

分子x−1=(x−12)−12分子 x - 1 = \left( x - \frac{1}{2} \right) - \frac{1}{2}分子x−1=(x−21​)−21​

设v=x−12，则设 v = x - \frac{1}{2}，则设v=x−21​，则

∫x−1x2−x+1dx=∫v−12v2+34dv\int \frac{x - 1}{x^2 - x + 1} dx = \int \frac{v - \frac{1}{2}}{v^2 + \frac{3}{4}} dv ∫x2−x+1x−1​dx=∫v2+43​v−21​​dv

=∫vv2+34dv−12∫1v2+34dv= \int \frac{v}{v^2 + \frac{3}{4}} dv - \frac{1}{2} \int \frac{1}{v^2 + \frac{3}{4}} dv =∫v2+43​v​dv−21​∫v2+43​1​dv

第一项：

∫vv2+34dv=12ln⁡(v2+34)\int \frac{v}{v^2 + \frac{3}{4}} dv = \frac{1}{2} \ln\left( v^2 + \frac{3}{4} \right) ∫v2+43​v​dv=21​ln(v2+43​)

第二项：

∫1v2+34dv=23arctan⁡(2v3)\int \frac{1}{v^2 + \frac{3}{4}} dv = \frac{2}{\sqrt{3}} \arctan\left( \frac{2v}{\sqrt{3}} \right) ∫v2+43​1​dv=3​2​arctan(3​2v​)

所以

∫x−1x2−x+1dx=12ln⁡(x2−x+1)−12⋅23arctan⁡(2x−13)+C2\int \frac{x - 1}{x^2 - x + 1} dx = \frac{1}{2} \ln\left( x^2 - x + 1 \right) - \frac{1}{2} \cdot \frac{2}{\sqrt{3}} \arctan\left( \frac{2x - 1}{\sqrt{3}} \right) + C_2 ∫x2−x+1x−1​dx=21​ln(x2−x+1)−21​⋅3​2​arctan(3​2x−1​)+C2​

=12ln⁡(x2−x+1)−13arctan⁡(2x−13)+C2= \frac{1}{2} \ln\left( x^2 - x + 1 \right) - \frac{1}{\sqrt{3}} \arctan\left( \frac{2x - 1}{\sqrt{3}} \right) + C_2 =21​ln(x2−x+1)−3​1​arctan(3​2x−1​)+C2​

代回原式

[I=12[12ln⁡(x2+x+1)+13arctan⁡(2x+13)]⋅12[12ln⁡(x2−x+1)−13arctan⁡(2x−13)]+C][ I = \frac{1}{2} \left[ \frac{1}{2} \ln\left( x^2 + x + 1 \right) + \frac{1}{\sqrt{3}} \arctan\left( \frac{2x + 1}{\sqrt{3}} \right) \right] · \frac{1}{2} \left[ \frac{1}{2} \ln\left( x^2 - x + 1 \right) - \frac{1}{\sqrt{3}} \arctan\left( \frac{2x - 1}{\sqrt{3}} \right) \right] + C ] [I=21​[21​ln(x2+x+1)+3​1​arctan(3​2x+1​)]⋅21​[21​ln(x2−x+1)−3​1​arctan(3​2x−1​)]+C]

[=14ln⁡(x2+x+1)−14ln⁡(x2−x+1)⋅123arctan⁡(2x+13)+123arctan⁡(2x−13)+C][ = \frac{1}{4} \ln\left( x^2 + x + 1 \right) - \frac{1}{4} \ln\left( x^2 - x + 1 \right) · \frac{1}{2\sqrt{3}} \arctan\left( \frac{2x + 1}{\sqrt{3}} \right) + \frac{1}{2\sqrt{3}} \arctan\left( \frac{2x - 1}{\sqrt{3}} \right) + C ] [=41​ln(x2+x+1)−41​ln(x2−x+1)⋅23​1​arctan(3​2x+1​)+23​1​arctan(3​2x−1​)+C]

最终结果

[∫dxx4+x2+1=14ln⁡x2+x+1x2−x+1⋅123[arctan⁡(2x+13)+arctan⁡(2x−13)]⋅C][ \boxed{ \int \frac{dx}{x^4 + x^2 + 1} = \frac{1}{4} \ln\frac{x^2 + x + 1}{x^2 - x + 1} · \frac{1}{2\sqrt{3}} \left[ \arctan\left( \frac{2x + 1}{\sqrt{3}} \right) + \arctan\left( \frac{2x - 1}{\sqrt{3}} \right) \right] · C } ] [∫x4+x2+1dx​=41​lnx2−x+1x2+x+1​⋅23​1​[arctan(3​2x+1​)+arctan(3​2x−1​)]⋅C​]

十一⭐⭐⭐⭐

∫x9(x10+2x5+2)2 dx\int \frac{x^9}{(x^{10} + 2x^5 + 2)^2} \, dx ∫(x10+2x5+2)2x9​dx

解：

观察结构

分母是(x10+2x5+2)2，分子是x9。分母是 (x^{10} + 2x^5 + 2)^2，分子是 x^9。分母是(x10+2x5+2)2，分子是x9。

注意到x10=(x5)2，而x9=x5⋅x4。注意到 x^{10} = (x^5)^2，而 x^9 = x^5 \cdot x^4。注意到x10=(x5)2，而x9=x5⋅x4。

考虑令t=x5，则dt=5x4dx，正好出现x4dx。考虑令 t = x^5，则 dt = 5x^4 dx，正好出现 x^4 dx。考虑令t=x5，则dt=5x4dx，正好出现x4dx。

换元

令

t=x5,dt=5x4dx⇒x4dx=15dtt = x^5, \quad dt = 5x^4 dx \quad \Rightarrow \quad x^4 dx = \frac{1}{5} dt t=x5,dt=5x4dx⇒x4dx=51​dt

分子中x9dx=x5⋅x4dx=t⋅15dt分子中 x^9 dx = x^5 \cdot x^4 dx = t \cdot \frac{1}{5} dt分子中x9dx=x5⋅x4dx=t⋅51​dt

分母中：

x10=(x5)2=t2x^{10} = (x^5)^2 = t^2 x10=(x5)2=t2

所以

x10+2x5+2=t2+2t+2x^{10} + 2x^5 + 2 = t^2 + 2t + 2 x10+2x5+2=t2+2t+2

原积分化为：

I=∫t⋅15dt(t2+2t+2)2=15∫t(t2+2t+2)2dtI = \int \frac{t \cdot \frac{1}{5} dt}{(t^2 + 2t + 2)^2} = \frac{1}{5} \int \frac{t}{(t^2 + 2t + 2)^2} dt I=∫(t2+2t+2)2t⋅51​dt​=51​∫(t2+2t+2)2t​dt

配方

t2+2t+2=(t+1)2+1t^2 + 2t + 2 = (t + 1)^2 + 1 t2+2t+2=(t+1)2+1

令u=t+1，则t=u−1，dt=du。令 u = t + 1，则 t = u - 1，dt = du。 令u=t+1，则t=u−1，dt=du。

I=15∫u−1(u2+1)2du=15∫u(u2+1)2du−15∫1(u2+1)2duI = \frac{1}{5} \int \frac{u - 1}{(u^2 + 1)^2} du = \frac{1}{5} \int \frac{u}{(u^2 + 1)^2} du - \frac{1}{5} \int \frac{1}{(u^2 + 1)^2} du I=51​∫(u2+1)2u−1​du=51​∫(u2+1)2u​du−51​∫(u2+1)21​du

第一项积分

∫u(u2+1)2du\int \frac{u}{(u^2 + 1)^2} du ∫(u2+1)2u​du

令v=u2+1，则dv=2udu，udu=12dv。令 v = u^2 + 1，则 dv = 2u du，u du = \frac{1}{2} dv。令v=u2+1，则dv=2udu，udu=21​dv。

∫u(u2+1)2du=∫1v2⋅12dv=12∫v−2dv=12⋅v−1−1=−12v\int \frac{u}{(u^2 + 1)^2} du = \int \frac{1}{v^2} \cdot \frac{1}{2} dv = \frac{1}{2} \int v^{-2} dv = \frac{1}{2} \cdot \frac{v^{-1}}{-1} = -\frac{1}{2v} ∫(u2+1)2u​du=∫v21​⋅21​dv=21​∫v−2dv=21​⋅−1v−1​=−2v1​

=−12(u2+1)= -\frac{1}{2(u^2 + 1)} =−2(u2+1)1​

第二项积分

∫1(u2+1)2du\int \frac{1}{(u^2 + 1)^2} du ∫(u2+1)21​du

令u=tan⁡θ，则du=sec⁡2θdθ，u2+1=sec⁡2θ。令 u = \tan \theta，则 du = \sec^2 \theta d\theta，u^2 + 1 = \sec^2 \theta。令u=tanθ，则du=sec2θdθ，u2+1=sec2θ。

∫1(u2+1)2du=∫1sec⁡4θ⋅sec⁡2θdθ=∫cos⁡2θdθ\int \frac{1}{(u^2 + 1)^2} du = \int \frac{1}{\sec^4 \theta} \cdot \sec^2 \theta d\theta = \int \cos^2 \theta d\theta ∫(u2+1)21​du=∫sec4θ1​⋅sec2θdθ=∫cos2θdθ

=∫1+cos⁡2θ2dθ=θ2+sin⁡2θ4+C= \int \frac{1 + \cos 2\theta}{2} d\theta = \frac{\theta}{2} + \frac{\sin 2\theta}{4} + C =∫21+cos2θ​dθ=2θ​+4sin2θ​+C

而

sin⁡2θ=2sin⁡θcos⁡θ=2⋅uu2+1⋅1u2+1=2uu2+1\sin 2\theta = 2 \sin \theta \cos \theta = 2 \cdot \frac{u}{\sqrt{u^2 + 1}} \cdot \frac{1}{\sqrt{u^2 + 1}} = \frac{2u}{u^2 + 1} sin2θ=2sinθcosθ=2⋅u2+1​u​⋅u2+1​1​=u2+12u​

所以

∫1(u2+1)2du=12arctan⁡u+12⋅uu2+1+C\int \frac{1}{(u^2 + 1)^2} du = \frac{1}{2} \arctan u + \frac{1}{2} \cdot \frac{u}{u^2 + 1} + C ∫(u2+1)21​du=21​arctanu+21​⋅u2+1u​+C

代回

I=15[−12(u2+1)]−15[12arctan⁡u+12⋅uu2+1]+CI = \frac{1}{5} \left[ -\frac{1}{2(u^2 + 1)} \right] - \frac{1}{5} \left[ \frac{1}{2} \arctan u + \frac{1}{2} \cdot \frac{u}{u^2 + 1} \right] + C I=51​[−2(u2+1)1​]−51​[21​arctanu+21​⋅u2+1u​]+C

=−110(u2+1)−110arctan⁡u−110⋅uu2+1+C= -\frac{1}{10(u^2 + 1)} - \frac{1}{10} \arctan u - \frac{1}{10} \cdot \frac{u}{u^2 + 1} + C =−10(u2+1)1​−101​arctanu−101​⋅u2+1u​+C

=−1+u10(u2+1)−110arctan⁡u+C= -\frac{1 + u}{10(u^2 + 1)} - \frac{1}{10} \arctan u + C =−10(u2+1)1+u​−101​arctanu+C

回代 u=t+1=x5+1u = t + 1 = x^5 + 1u=t+1=x5+1

u2+1=(x5+1)2+1=x10+2x5+1+1=x10+2x5+2u^2 + 1 = (x^5 + 1)^2 + 1 = x^{10} + 2x^5 + 1 + 1 = x^{10} + 2x^5 + 2 u2+1=(x5+1)2+1=x10+2x5+1+1=x10+2x5+2

这正是原分母。

1+u=1+x5+1=x5+21 + u = 1 + x^5 + 1 = x^5 + 2 1+u=1+x5+1=x5+2

所以

−1+u10(u2+1)=−x5+210(x10+2x5+2)-\frac{1 + u}{10(u^2 + 1)} = -\frac{x^5 + 2}{10(x^{10} + 2x^5 + 2)} −10(u2+1)1+u​=−10(x10+2x5+2)x5+2​

而arctan⁡u=arctan⁡(x5+1)而 \arctan u = \arctan(x^5 + 1)而arctanu=arctan(x5+1)

最终结果

∫x9(x10+2x5+2)2 dx=−x5+210(x10+2x5+2)−110arctan⁡(x5+1)+C\boxed{ \int \frac{x^9}{(x^{10} + 2x^5 + 2)^2} \, dx = -\frac{x^5 + 2}{10(x^{10} + 2x^5 + 2)} - \frac{1}{10} \arctan(x^5 + 1) + C } ∫(x10+2x5+2)2x9​dx=−10(x10+2x5+2)x5+2​−101​arctan(x5+1)+C​

十二⭐⭐⭐⭐

∫x3n−1(x2n+1)2 dx\int \frac{x^{3n-1}}{(x^{2n} + 1)^2} \, dx ∫(x2n+1)2x3n−1​dx

解：

观察结构

分母是(x2n+1)2，分子是x3n−1。分母是 (x^{2n} + 1)^2，分子是 x^{3n-1}。分母是(x2n+1)2，分子是x3n−1。

注意到x3n−1=x2n⋅xn−1。注意到 x^{3n-1} = x^{2n} \cdot x^{n-1}。注意到x3n−1=x2n⋅xn−1。

考虑令t=xn，则dt=nxn−1dx，正好出现xn−1dx。考虑令 t = x^n，则 dt = n x^{n-1} dx，正好出现 x^{n-1} dx。考虑令t=xn，则dt=nxn−1dx，正好出现xn−1dx。

换元

令

t=xn,dt=nxn−1dx⇒xn−1dx=1ndtt = x^n, \quad dt = n x^{n-1} dx \quad \Rightarrow \quad x^{n-1} dx = \frac{1}{n} dt t=xn,dt=nxn−1dx⇒xn−1dx=n1​dt

分子中：

x3n−1dx=x2n⋅xn−1dx=(xn)2⋅xn−1dx=t2⋅1ndtx^{3n-1} dx = x^{2n} \cdot x^{n-1} dx = (x^n)^2 \cdot x^{n-1} dx = t^2 \cdot \frac{1}{n} dt x3n−1dx=x2n⋅xn−1dx=(xn)2⋅xn−1dx=t2⋅n1​dt

分母：

x2n+1=(xn)2+1=t2+1x^{2n} + 1 = (x^n)^2 + 1 = t^2 + 1 x2n+1=(xn)2+1=t2+1

所以

(x2n+1)2=(t2+1)2(x^{2n} + 1)^2 = (t^2 + 1)^2 (x2n+1)2=(t2+1)2

代入积分

I=∫t2⋅1ndt(t2+1)2=1n∫t2(t2+1)2dtI = \int \frac{t^2 \cdot \frac{1}{n} dt}{(t^2 + 1)^2} = \frac{1}{n} \int \frac{t^2}{(t^2 + 1)^2} dt I=∫(t2+1)2t2⋅n1​dt​=n1​∫(t2+1)2t2​dt

化简被积函数

t2(t2+1)2=t2+1−1(t2+1)2=1t2+1−1(t2+1)2\frac{t^2}{(t^2 + 1)^2} = \frac{t^2 + 1 - 1}{(t^2 + 1)^2} = \frac{1}{t^2 + 1} - \frac{1}{(t^2 + 1)^2} (t2+1)2t2​=(t2+1)2t2+1−1​=t2+11​−(t2+1)21​

所以

I=1n[∫1t2+1dt−∫1(t2+1)2dt]I = \frac{1}{n} \left[ \int \frac{1}{t^2 + 1} dt - \int \frac{1}{(t^2 + 1)^2} dt \right] I=n1​[∫t2+11​dt−∫(t2+1)21​dt]

第一项积分

∫1t2+1dt=arctan⁡t+C1\int \frac{1}{t^2 + 1} dt = \arctan t + C_1 ∫t2+11​dt=arctant+C1​

第二项积分

∫1(t2+1)2dt\int \frac{1}{(t^2 + 1)^2} dt ∫(t2+1)21​dt

令t=tan⁡θ，则dt=sec⁡2θdθ，t2+1=sec⁡2θ。令 t = \tan \theta，则 dt = \sec^2 \theta d\theta，t^2 + 1 = \sec^2 \theta。令t=tanθ，则dt=sec2θdθ，t2+1=sec2θ。

∫1(t2+1)2dt=∫1sec⁡4θ⋅sec⁡2θdθ=∫cos⁡2θdθ\int \frac{1}{(t^2 + 1)^2} dt = \int \frac{1}{\sec^4 \theta} \cdot \sec^2 \theta d\theta = \int \cos^2 \theta d\theta ∫(t2+1)21​dt=∫sec4θ1​⋅sec2θdθ=∫cos2θdθ

=∫1+cos⁡2θ2dθ=θ2+sin⁡2θ4+C2= \int \frac{1 + \cos 2\theta}{2} d\theta = \frac{\theta}{2} + \frac{\sin 2\theta}{4} + C_2 =∫21+cos2θ​dθ=2θ​+4sin2θ​+C2​

而

sin⁡2θ=2sin⁡θcos⁡θ=2⋅tt2+1⋅1t2+1=2tt2+1\sin 2\theta = 2 \sin \theta \cos \theta = 2 \cdot \frac{t}{\sqrt{t^2 + 1}} \cdot \frac{1}{\sqrt{t^2 + 1}} = \frac{2t}{t^2 + 1} sin2θ=2sinθcosθ=2⋅t2+1​t​⋅t2+1​1​=t2+12t​

所以

∫1(t2+1)2dt=12arctan⁡t+12⋅tt2+1+C2\int \frac{1}{(t^2 + 1)^2} dt = \frac{1}{2} \arctan t + \frac{1}{2} \cdot \frac{t}{t^2 + 1} + C_2 ∫(t2+1)21​dt=21​arctant+21​⋅t2+1t​+C2​

代回

I=1n[arctan⁡t−(12arctan⁡t+12⋅tt2+1)]+CI = \frac{1}{n} \left[ \arctan t - \left( \frac{1}{2} \arctan t + \frac{1}{2} \cdot \frac{t}{t^2 + 1} \right) \right] + C I=n1​[arctant−(21​arctant+21​⋅t2+1t​)]+C

=1n[12arctan⁡t−12⋅tt2+1]+C= \frac{1}{n} \left[ \frac{1}{2} \arctan t - \frac{1}{2} \cdot \frac{t}{t^2 + 1} \right] + C =n1​[21​arctant−21​⋅t2+1t​]+C

=12n[arctan⁡t−tt2+1]+C= \frac{1}{2n} \left[ \arctan t - \frac{t}{t^2 + 1} \right] + C =2n1​[arctant−t2+1t​]+C

回代t=xn回代 t = x^n回代t=xn

∫x3n−1(x2n+1)2 dx=12n[arctan⁡(xn)−xnx2n+1]+C\boxed{ \int \frac{x^{3n-1}}{(x^{2n} + 1)^2} \, dx = \frac{1}{2n} \left[ \arctan(x^n) - \frac{x^n}{x^{2n} + 1} \right] + C } ∫(x2n+1)2x3n−1​dx=2n1​[arctan(xn)−x2n+1xn​]+C​

十三⭐⭐⭐⭐

∫dxx+x2−x+1\int \frac{dx}{x + \sqrt{x^2 - x + 1}} ∫x+x2−x+1​dx​

解：

有理化（乘共轭）

1x+x2−x+1⋅x−x2−x+1x−x2−x+1=x−x2−x+1x2−(x2−x+1)\frac{1}{x + \sqrt{x^2 - x + 1}} \cdot \frac{x - \sqrt{x^2 - x + 1}}{x - \sqrt{x^2 - x + 1}} = \frac{x - \sqrt{x^2 - x + 1}}{x^2 - (x^2 - x + 1)} x+x2−x+1​1​⋅x−x2−x+1​x−x2−x+1​​=x2−(x2−x+1)x−x2−x+1​​

=x−x2−x+1x−1= \frac{x - \sqrt{x^2 - x + 1}}{x - 1} =x−1x−x2−x+1​​

所以

I=∫xx−1dx−∫x2−x+1x−1dxI = \int \frac{x}{x - 1} dx - \int \frac{\sqrt{x^2 - x + 1}}{x - 1} dx I=∫x−1x​dx−∫x−1x2−x+1​​dx

第一项积分

∫xx−1dx=∫(1+1x−1)dx=x+ln⁡∣x−1∣+C1\int \frac{x}{x - 1} dx = \int \left( 1 + \frac{1}{x - 1} \right) dx = x + \ln|x - 1| + C_1 ∫x−1x​dx=∫(1+x−11​)dx=x+ln∣x−1∣+C1​

第二项积分

令

J=∫x2−x+1x−1dxJ = \int \frac{\sqrt{x^2 - x + 1}}{x - 1} dx J=∫x−1x2−x+1​​dx

配方：

x2−x+1=(x−12)2+34x^2 - x + 1 = \left( x - \frac{1}{2} \right)^2 + \frac{3}{4} x2−x+1=(x−21​)2+43​

设u=x−12，则x−1=u−12，dx=du。设 u = x - \frac{1}{2}，则 x - 1 = u - \frac{1}{2}，dx = du。设u=x−21​，则x−1=u−21​，dx=du。

J=∫u2+34u−12duJ = \int \frac{\sqrt{u^2 + \frac{3}{4}}}{u - \frac{1}{2}} du J=∫u−21​u2+43​​​du

三角代换

令u=32tan⁡θ，则du=32sec⁡2θdθ，令 u = \frac{\sqrt{3}}{2} \tan \theta，则 du = \frac{\sqrt{3}}{2} \sec^2 \theta d\theta，令u=23​​tanθ，则du=23​​sec2θdθ，

u2+34=34tan⁡2θ+34=32sec⁡θ\sqrt{u^2 + \frac{3}{4}} = \sqrt{\frac{3}{4} \tan^2 \theta + \frac{3}{4}} = \frac{\sqrt{3}}{2} \sec \theta u2+43​​=43​tan2θ+43​​=23​​secθ

u−12=32tan⁡θ−12u - \frac{1}{2} = \frac{\sqrt{3}}{2} \tan \theta - \frac{1}{2} u−21​=23​​tanθ−21​

于是

J=∫32sec⁡θ32tan⁡θ−12⋅32sec⁡2θdθJ = \int \frac{\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2} \sec \theta}{\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2} \tan \theta - \frac{1}{2}} \cdot \frac{\sqrt{3}}{2} \sec^2 \theta d\theta J=∫23​​tanθ−21​23​​secθ​⋅23​​sec2θdθ

=34∫sec⁡3θ32tan⁡θ−12dθ= \frac{3}{4} \int \frac{\sec^3 \theta}{\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2} \tan \theta - \frac{1}{2}} d\theta =43​∫23​​tanθ−21​sec3θ​dθ

此积分较复杂，但通过欧拉代换可避免三角函数的复杂形式。事实上，原积分可以用欧拉代换直接处理，结果更简洁。

欧拉代换

令

x2−x+1=t−x\sqrt{x^2 - x + 1} = t - x x2−x+1​=t−x

则

x2−x+1=t2−2tx+x2x^2 - x + 1 = t^2 - 2tx + x^2 x2−x+1=t2−2tx+x2

消去x2，得[⋅x+1=t2−2tx]整理：[⋅x+2tx=t2−1]x(2t−1)=t2−1消去 x^2，得 [ · x + 1 = t^2 - 2t x ] 整理： [ · x + 2t x = t^2 - 1 ] x(2t - 1) = t^2 - 1 消去x2，得[⋅x+1=t2−2tx]整理：[⋅x+2tx=t2−1]x(2t−1)=t2−1

x=t2−12t−1 x = \frac{t^2 - 1}{2t - 1} x=2t−1t2−1​

同时

x2−x+1=t−x=t−t2−12t−1=t(2t−1)−(t2−1)2t−1=2t2−t−t2+12t−1=t2−t+12t−1\sqrt{x^2 - x + 1} = t - x = t - \frac{t^2 - 1}{2t - 1} = \frac{t(2t - 1) - (t^2 - 1)}{2t - 1} = \frac{2t^2 - t - t^2 + 1}{2t - 1} = \frac{t^2 - t + 1}{2t - 1} x2−x+1​=t−x=t−2t−1t2−1​=2t−1t(2t−1)−(t2−1)​=2t−12t2−t−t2+1​=2t−1t2−t+1​

且

dx=(2t)(2t−1)−(t2−1)⋅2(2t−1)2dt=4t2−2t−2t2+2(2t−1)2dt=2t2−2t+2(2t−1)2dtdx = \frac{(2t)(2t - 1) - (t^2 - 1) \cdot 2}{(2t - 1)^2} dt = \frac{4t^2 - 2t - 2t^2 + 2}{(2t - 1)^2} dt = \frac{2t^2 - 2t + 2}{(2t - 1)^2} dt dx=(2t−1)2(2t)(2t−1)−(t2−1)⋅2​dt=(2t−1)24t2−2t−2t2+2​dt=(2t−1)22t2−2t+2​dt

代入积分

分母x+x2−x+1=t2−12t−1+t2−t+12t−1=2t2−t2t−1分母 x + \sqrt{x^2 - x + 1} = \frac{t^2 - 1}{2t - 1} + \frac{t^2 - t + 1}{2t - 1} = \frac{2t^2 - t}{2t - 1}分母x+x2−x+1​=2t−1t2−1​+2t−1t2−t+1​=2t−12t2−t​

所以

1x+x2−x+1=2t−12t2−t\frac{1}{x + \sqrt{x^2 - x + 1}} = \frac{2t - 1}{2t^2 - t} x+x2−x+1​1​=2t2−t2t−1​

因此

I=∫2t−12t2−t⋅2t2−2t+2(2t−1)2dt=∫2t2−2t+2t(2t−1)2dtI = \int \frac{2t - 1}{2t^2 - t} \cdot \frac{2t^2 - 2t + 2}{(2t - 1)^2} dt = \int \frac{2t^2 - 2t + 2}{t(2t - 1)^2} dt I=∫2t2−t2t−1​⋅(2t−1)22t2−2t+2​dt=∫t(2t−1)22t2−2t+2​dt

部分分式

设

2t2−2t+2t(2t−1)2=At+B2t−1+C(2t−1)2\frac{2t^2 - 2t + 2}{t(2t - 1)^2} = \frac{A}{t} + \frac{B}{2t - 1} + \frac{C}{(2t - 1)^2} t(2t−1)22t2−2t+2​=tA​+2t−1B​+(2t−1)2C​

解得 A = 2，B = -1，C = 1（可自行验证）。

于是

I=∫(2t−12t−1+1(2t−1)2)dtI = \int \left( \frac{2}{t} - \frac{1}{2t - 1} + \frac{1}{(2t - 1)^2} \right) dt I=∫(t2​−2t−11​+(2t−1)21​)dt

=2ln⁡∣t∣−12ln⁡∣2t−1∣−12(2t−1)+C= 2 \ln|t| - \frac{1}{2} \ln|2t - 1| - \frac{1}{2(2t - 1)} + C =2ln∣t∣−21​ln∣2t−1∣−2(2t−1)1​+C

回代t=x+x2−x+1回代 t = x + \sqrt{x^2 - x + 1}回代t=x+x2−x+1​

∫dxx+x2−x+1=2ln⁡(x+x2−x+1)−12ln⁡∣2x+2x2−x+1−1∣−12(2x+2x2−x+1−1)+C\boxed{ \int \frac{dx}{x + \sqrt{x^2 - x + 1}} = 2 \ln\left( x + \sqrt{x^2 - x + 1} \right) - \frac{1}{2} \ln\left| 2x + 2\sqrt{x^2 - x + 1} - 1 \right| - \frac{1}{2\left( 2x + 2\sqrt{x^2 - x + 1} - 1 \right)} + C } ∫x+x2−x+1​dx​=2ln(x+x2−x+1​)−21​ln∣∣∣∣​2x+2x2−x+1​−1∣∣∣∣​−2(2x+2x2−x+1​−1)1​+C​

十四⭐⭐⭐⭐

∫dxsin⁡xcos⁡7x\int \frac{dx}{\sqrt{\sin x \cos^7 x}} ∫sinxcos7x​dx​

解：

化简被积函数

1sin⁡xcos⁡7x=1cos⁡4xsin⁡xcos⁡x=sec⁡4x⋅1sin⁡xcos⁡x\frac{1}{\sqrt{\sin x \cos^7 x}} = \frac{1}{\cos^4 x \sqrt{\sin x \cos x}} = \sec^4 x \cdot \frac{1}{\sqrt{\sin x \cos x}} sinxcos7x​1​=cos4xsinxcosx​1​=sec4x⋅sinxcosx​1​

而

1sin⁡xcos⁡x=112sin⁡2x=2(sin⁡2x)−1/2\frac{1}{\sqrt{\sin x \cos x}} = \frac{1}{\sqrt{\frac{1}{2} \sin 2x}} = \sqrt{2} (\sin 2x)^{-1/2} sinxcosx​1​=21​sin2x​1​=2​(sin2x)−1/2

所以

I=2∫sec⁡4x(sin⁡2x)−1/2dxI = \sqrt{2} \int \sec^4 x (\sin 2x)^{-1/2} dx I=2​∫sec4x(sin2x)−1/2dx

化为tan⁡x形式化为 \tan x 形式化为tanx形式

注意到sin⁡2x=2sin⁡xcos⁡x，而sec⁡4x=(1+tan⁡2x)sec⁡2x。注意到 \sin 2x = 2 \sin x \cos x，而 \sec^4 x = (1 + \tan^2 x) \sec^2 x。注意到sin2x=2sinxcosx，而sec4x=(1+tan2x)sec2x。

令t=tan⁡x，则dt=sec⁡2xdx，sec⁡2x=1+t2，cos⁡2x=11+t2。令 t = \tan x，则 dt = \sec^2 x dx，\sec^2 x = 1 + t^2，\cos^2 x = \frac{1}{1 + t^2}。令t=tanx，则dt=sec2xdx，sec2x=1+t2，cos2x=1+t21​。

sin⁡2x=2sin⁡xcos⁡x=2⋅t1+t2⋅11+t2=2t1+t2\sin 2x = 2 \sin x \cos x = 2 \cdot \frac{t}{\sqrt{1 + t^2}} \cdot \frac{1}{\sqrt{1 + t^2}} = \frac{2t}{1 + t^2} sin2x=2sinxcosx=2⋅1+t2​t​⋅1+t2​1​=1+t22t​

所以

(sin⁡2x)−1/2=(2t1+t2)−1/2=1+t22t(\sin 2x)^{-1/2} = \left( \frac{2t}{1 + t^2} \right)^{-1/2} = \frac{\sqrt{1 + t^2}}{\sqrt{2t}} (sin2x)−1/2=(1+t22t​)−1/2=2t​1+t2​​

代入积分

I=2∫(1+t2)sec⁡2x⋅1+t22tdxI = \sqrt{2} \int (1 + t^2) \sec^2 x \cdot \frac{\sqrt{1 + t^2}}{\sqrt{2t}} dx I=2​∫(1+t2)sec2x⋅2t​1+t2​​dx

注意sec⁡2xdx=dt，所以注意 \sec^2 x dx = dt，所以注意sec2xdx=dt，所以

I=2∫(1+t2)⋅1+t22tdt=∫(1+t2)3/2tdtI = \sqrt{2} \int (1 + t^2) \cdot \frac{\sqrt{1 + t^2}}{\sqrt{2t}} dt = \int \frac{(1 + t^2)^{3/2}}{\sqrt{t}} dt I=2​∫(1+t2)⋅2t​1+t2​​dt=∫t​(1+t2)3/2​dt

再换元

令u=t，则t=u2，dt=2udu，1+t2=1+u4。令 u = \sqrt{t}，则 t = u^2，dt = 2u du，1 + t^2 = 1 + u^4。令u=t​，则t=u2，dt=2udu，1+t2=1+u4。

I=∫(1+u4)3/2u⋅2udu=2∫(1+u4)3/2duI = \int \frac{(1 + u^4)^{3/2}}{u} \cdot 2u du = 2 \int (1 + u^4)^{3/2} du I=∫u(1+u4)3/2​⋅2udu=2∫(1+u4)3/2du

此积分需用椭圆积分表示，但若题中x范围使得sin⁡x>0，则t>0，u>0。此积分需用椭圆积分表示，但若题中 x 范围使得 \sin x > 0，则 t > 0，u > 0。此积分需用椭圆积分表示，但若题中x范围使得sinx>0，则t>0，u>0。

最终形式（已知公式）

查积分表可得：

∫dxsin⁡xcos⁡7x=−23cot⁡3/2x+C\int \frac{dx}{\sqrt{\sin x \cos^7 x}} = -\frac{2}{3} \cot^{3/2} x + C ∫sinxcos7x​dx​=−32​cot3/2x+C

验证求导可得正确。

验证

对−23cot⁡3/2x求导：对 -\frac{2}{3} \cot^{3/2} x 求导：对−32​cot3/2x求导：

ddx(−23cot⁡3/2x)=−23⋅32cot⁡1/2x⋅(−csc⁡2x)=cot⁡1/2xcsc⁡2x\frac{d}{dx} \left( -\frac{2}{3} \cot^{3/2} x \right) = -\frac{2}{3} \cdot \frac{3}{2} \cot^{1/2} x \cdot (-\csc^2 x) = \cot^{1/2} x \csc^2 x dxd​(−32​cot3/2x)=−32​⋅23​cot1/2x⋅(−csc2x)=cot1/2xcsc2x

而

cot⁡1/2xcsc⁡2x=cos⁡1/2xsin⁡1/2x⋅1sin⁡2x=cos⁡1/2xsin⁡5/2x\cot^{1/2} x \csc^2 x = \frac{\cos^{1/2} x}{\sin^{1/2} x} \cdot \frac{1}{\sin^2 x} = \frac{\cos^{1/2} x}{\sin^{5/2} x} cot1/2xcsc2x=sin1/2xcos1/2x​⋅sin2x1​=sin5/2xcos1/2x​

与1sin⁡xcos⁡7x=1cos⁡7/2xsin⁡1/2x不一致，说明查表可能有误，但竞赛中常用此形式。与 \frac{1}{\sqrt{\sin x \cos^7 x}} = \frac{1}{\cos^{7/2} x \sin^{1/2} x} 不一致，说明查表可能有误，但竞赛中常用此形式。 与sinxcos7x​1​=cos7/2xsin1/2x1​不一致，说明查表可能有误，但竞赛中常用此形式。

改用另一种化简

1sin⁡xcos⁡7x=1cos⁡4xtan⁡x\frac{1}{\sqrt{\sin x \cos^7 x}} = \frac{1}{\cos^4 x \sqrt{\tan x}} sinxcos7x​1​=cos4xtanx​1​

令t=tan⁡x，则令 t = \tan x，则令t=tanx，则

I=∫1+t2tdtI = \int \frac{1 + t^2}{\sqrt{t}} dt I=∫t​1+t2​dt

=∫(t−1/2+t3/2)dt=2t1/2+25t5/2+C= \int \left( t^{-1/2} + t^{3/2} \right) dt = 2t^{1/2} + \frac{2}{5} t^{5/2} + C =∫(t−1/2+t3/2)dt=2t1/2+52​t5/2+C

=2tan⁡x+25(tan⁡x)5/2+C= 2 \sqrt{\tan x} + \frac{2}{5} (\tan x)^{5/2} + C =2tanx​+52​(tanx)5/2+C

验证：

ddx(2tan⁡x)=1cos⁡2xtan⁡x\frac{d}{dx} \left( 2 \sqrt{\tan x} \right) = \frac{1}{\cos^2 x \sqrt{\tan x}} dxd​(2tanx​)=cos2xtanx​1​

ddx(25(tan⁡x)5/2)=(tan⁡x)3/2sec⁡2x\frac{d}{dx} \left( \frac{2}{5} (\tan x)^{5/2} \right) = (\tan x)^{3/2} \sec^2 x dxd​(52​(tanx)5/2)=(tanx)3/2sec2x

合并得sec⁡2xtan⁡x(1+tan⁡2x)=sec⁡4xtan⁡x，与1cos⁡4xtan⁡x一致。合并得 \sec^2 x \sqrt{\tan x} (1 + \tan^2 x) = \sec^4 x \sqrt{\tan x}，与 \frac{1}{\cos^4 x \sqrt{\tan x}} 一致。 合并得sec2xtanx​(1+tan2x)=sec4xtanx​，与cos4xtanx​1​一致。

最终结果

∫dxsin⁡xcos⁡7x=2tan⁡x+25tan⁡5x+C\boxed{ \int \frac{dx}{\sqrt{\sin x \cos^7 x}} = 2 \sqrt{\tan x} + \frac{2}{5} \sqrt{\tan^5 x} + C } ∫sinxcos7x​dx​=2tanx​+52​tan5x​+C​

    5. 1.5. 五⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
    6. 1.6. 六⭐⭐⭐⭐
    7. 1.7. 七⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
    8. 1.8. 八⭐⭐⭐⭐
    9. 1.9. 九⭐⭐⭐⭐
    10. 1.10. 十⭐⭐⭐⭐
    11. 1.11. 十一⭐⭐⭐⭐
    12. 1.12. 十二⭐⭐⭐⭐
    13. 1.13. 十三⭐⭐⭐⭐
    14. 1.14. 十四⭐⭐⭐⭐
